Fellow American - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

body:
We just made history. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us6.campaign-archive.com/?e=c87c5d8d97&u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=9d3f72d00f)

---
| Peter,

Wow.

I could not be more proud of what we have just accomplished.

Thanks to your never-wavering support, Oregon just picked up its **FIRST Republican** seat __since 1994__.

Not only that, I am now Oregons’ **FIRST** Hispanic Congresswoman and **FIRST** Republican woman from Oregon!

And together, we just made history, Peter.

My team was so excited about this monumental victory that they made you and me a hype video to share!

Check it out —>

name: Herschel Walker

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $34, $50, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849283:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849283:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849284:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)
[** RUSH $34 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849285:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849286:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $25 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849283:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849283:6CQnfpGIN:m:1:3367311000:6EAF31BCBAACD0206F3A95669D0422E9:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Response Requested (via DLCC.org)
subject: How did you feel about state Democrats’ performance in the midterm elections?
body:
With so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. | | |
---
| | **State Democrats had a historic showing in this year’s midterm election! We notched victories in key battleground states like Michigan, Maine, and Minnesota – and that’s _before_ ballots have been officially tabulated in some of our key states.** But with so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. **[_How did you feel about Democrats’ performance in the midterm elections? clean_body: With so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. | | | | | State Democrats had a historic showing in this year’s midterm election! We notched victories in key battleground states like Michigan, Maine, and Minnesota – and that’s before ballots have been officially tabulated in some of our key states. But with so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. Your voice, your time, and your support – these are the only reasons our party was able to make so many gains on Election Day. That's why we want to hear directly from you today. That’s why we launched our 2022 midterms exit survey – to see where our impact was strongest and identify what we need to work on ahead of the next elections. Thanks for your input, Team DLCC | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Thank you, Kansas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
[[A Personal Message from Congressman Jake LaTurner] | |
---
| | | Friend,

Thank you! It is an honor to be re-elected to represent the Second Congressional District of Kansas in the House of Representatives. Thank you for believing in me, our mission, and our great nation.

I could not have done it without your help. I am so grateful for all our amazing volunteers and supporters across Kansas. This is a victory for all the hard-working families and Kansans that made their voices heard at the ballot box and took action to end one-party Democrat rule in Washington.
---
|
---
| Now, the real work begins. I will work to bring down inflation, secure the southern border, fund our law enforcement officers, support our veterans, and empower farmers and ranchers across our state. Most importantly, I will fight for a Congress that works for you—not the other way around.

It is an honor to represent Kansas families and businesses across the Second District, and I can't wait to continue fighting for our shared values and beliefs in the 118th Congress. God Bless!
Sincerely,

Jake LaTurner
---
|
---

clean_body: to re-elect Rev. Warnock | | | We’ll keep this quick because we don’t have much time to spare: As we’re sure you’re aware, Rev. Warnock is in the closest race in the country right now – a race that could decide the balance of the Senate. After laying it all on the line on Tuesday, we need to refill our resources to be able to reach all the strong Democrats across the state and make sure they’ll come out to vote on December 6th. That’s in less than a month. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We have less than a month to pull off a massive voter turnout operation, Peter, but we know we can do it with your help. Thank you, The Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Hi ,

I hope this email finds you well.

First and foremost, my family and I would like to thank you for your vote, support, generous contributions, and prayers throughout this campaign.

We couldn't have run this race without you, and I am amazed at what we accomplished together.

Many of you shared our posts and emails, made phone calls, canvassed neighborhoods, donated generously, and rallied behind Team Dahle.

THANK YOU!

What we saw and accomplished together was record-breaking.

Your support inspired Californians across the state to stand up for what they believe in, and what we saw on Tuesday was truly incredible.

The votes that have been counted so far already show a much tighter margin than last year’s recall vote!

You raised your voice, and the entire world noticed.

We will continue to watch the numbers over the next few weeks; no matter the outcome, we know there is still hope for California!

We aren't giving up, and we know you aren't either.

This much will always remain true**—** my family and I are committed to California.

We love this state and will continue to do everything we can to make the Californian dream a reality.

Moving forward, we are in this together with you as we stand up against bad policies this coming Legislative session, and fight on your behalf for a better California.

We are in this together.

With Sincere Gratitude,

-Brian

PS**—** I issued a**** statement**** regarding**** the race;** ** you**** can**** read**** that** [here](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=e9bbf47cf2&e=f9133ea432). **

The Georgia Senate runoff has implications for EVERY AMERICAN. If we FAIL to recapture the Majority, America may fall victim to Big Government Socialism.

This is the most impactful runoff in American history, Fellow American. I'd have to agree with you, Megyn.

Under our administration, we **PROTECTED** and **DEFENDED** the sovereign borders of the United States of America.

We had **PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH.** Our country was safe all because you had a president who always put **AMERICA FIRST! **

Our great Nation became the #1 oil and gas producer in the entire world, and we saved the average American family THOUSANDS of dollars at the gas pump.

Our children were learning to LOVE AMERICA in the classroom, _NOT_ woke, Left-wing, and racist Critical Race Theory.

Now, we are seeing what happens when you let Radical Left lunatics run the White House--_**and you can 't say I didn't warn you.**_

**As a result, more people are joining our common-sense, patriotic movement every day, demanding more jobs, strong borders, fair trade, law and order, and GREATNESS for our beloved Country. Because our Nation has seen first-hand exactly what a Democrat-run Washington is like.**

I'll never stop working to**SAVE AMERICA** , but I can't do it alone. I need my **BEST** supporters to stand with me and help **DEFEND** our Country.

clean_body: I'd have to agree with you, Megyn. Under our administration, we PROTECTED and DEFENDED the sovereign borders of the United States of America. We had PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH. Our country was safe all because you had a president who always put AMERICA FIRST! Our great Nation became the #1 oil and gas producer in the entire world, and we saved the average American family THOUSANDS of dollars at the gas pump. Our children were learning to LOVE AMERICA in the classroom, NOT woke, Left-wing, and racist Critical Race Theory. Now, we are seeing what happens when you let Radical Left lunatics run the White House--and you can 't say I didn't warn you. As a result, more people are joining our common-sense, patriotic movement every day, demanding more jobs, strong borders, fair trade, law and order, and GREATNESS for our beloved Country. Because our Nation has seen first-hand exactly what a Democrat-run Washington is like. I'll never stop working toSAVE AMERICA , but I can't do it alone. I need my BEST supporters to stand with me and help DEFEND our Country. Friend, I 've always been able to count on you, so I want to know what you think. Other nations should not mistake JOE BIDEN'S weakness for AMERICA'S weakness. American power, American might, and American leadership will soon be back--and stronger than ever. We will fight for more jobs for American families, fair trade for American workers, and more American factories forging more products stamped with that beautiful phrase, MADE IN THE USA. We will shut down Joe Biden's inflation disaster, bring this socialist spending spree to an immediate halt , and move to quickly defend our traditions and our historic AMERICAN VALUES. Friend, our movement to SAVE AMERICA is far from over --in fact, it is only just beginning. I need to know you're with me because I can't do this alone. My movement is NOTHING without the support of FREEDOM-LOVING PATRIOTS from all across the Nation. This is your chance to tell me EXACTLY what you think. I will be looking for your response. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: R. Warnock
subject: last call today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I need you with me to win this runoff election in Georgia.
| | |
---
Friend, we just missed our Runoff Founding Donor goal.

This isn't the update I want to be sharing as we kickstart this new phase of our campaign – but I know __ we can turn things around if we act fast. **We need only 22 more grassroots folks to rush their support by midnight to keep up our momentum in this critical moment.**
Right now, I'm running neck and neck with Herschel Walker, and this runoff Senate race will be decided on the margins. _I need you with me to win._

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore.Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-gcYg).Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food – it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) when you get yours today.It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal:[**You get $318 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-YlVhStkmUUXiHwDShVoQ)**FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today.That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website.And you get...**FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again.**FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos.**FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order.But that's not all because you also get...**FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE.**FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit.**FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food.But we're still not done, because you also get...**FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal.But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get...**FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you.**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**Isn't that great?The best part is...You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile.[**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan – with no interest!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._w) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock.**Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you.Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value.That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years.**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._bYP5sc0RmxXzy69ilw)**You need to get 'er done today.Why?Because if you don't [**take action**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Q) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine."And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless.But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit.**As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. | | | Dear Peter --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848952:66ibnpGNE:m:1:3331421248:2BC39DDE62CC5B93BDC5ECE7DE85450A:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848952:66ibnpGNE:m:1:3331421248:2BC39DDE62CC5B93BDC5ECE7DE85450A:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848952:66ibnpGNE:m:1:3331421248:2BC39DDE62CC5B93BDC5ECE7DE85450A:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848952:66ibnpGNE:m:1:3331421248:2BC39DDE62CC5B93BDC5ECE7DE85450A:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848952:66ibnpGNE:m:1:3331421248:2BC39DDE62CC5B93BDC5ECE7DE85450A:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848952:66ibnpGNE:m:1:3331421248:2BC39DDE62CC5B93BDC5ECE7DE85450A:r)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

subject: Here we go again

body:

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849896:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849897:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849898:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849899:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849896:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849896:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849896:JiVBnpGxN:m:1:3346849603:A7FC2846DD5808C9EB8AD181E6EA8426:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 Felonies for Exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2e95go5plv5d82nvuauj61rbgu4ij527b23a130_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdthq177ln1sqac5habr8pftk6jrp72a45c4uir8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm84gsnc76hbee2it3ijq8cmup4nv49s1jbp1fgg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlgm9n4hah0r9hbrcac2kl7bp479umfi9d3q0n9o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdm7vb031f5pb330002iuq9fnh43ebrb6nsm3f5g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqlqota6g4etg5d5th6dr4j5p3d2lgtubkgdh4s8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3s31g4fv4nau4bma6kb3g319vaiubf614a1kt3g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn7a3c283ss8bppslqvfkqjlcmhhlb3v09m0sm98_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9heprda880hmlfmiltt16sbkqs3hr1q8q6jekig_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5vhf35esq3kldssmgm19lniabpoeodtc82jul0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im0o76clh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6391%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=rVMgDFzfOo2q4YdiLXQkrQ&sysid=1)
|
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82649%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DfTDejBAjxWTMlKS209m%2fg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82640%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3WIwtnTQGkS%2bBEcyQ9St7Q&sysid=1) **

[** Donate $5 → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82641%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E1IE0LdHn3Z%2bSd%2f6PszT9A&sysid=1)
[** Donate $15 → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82642%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cOSZItie0LLlcBtcEkX7Wg&sysid=1)
[** Donate $34 → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82643%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bRFvwPkaHX0K3Tb3Z2JuVg&sysid=1)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82644%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sqiQMztPVWuXgj5aFyc83w&sysid=1)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82755%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eFJAa1Vcm%2bf1VTswixHTSg&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82756%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dys%2bXpXsI1f3skD4iONu2Q&sysid=1)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82757%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AczxPfsUE0r78zYmtL%2fkNQ&sysid=1)

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82758%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ex01HRl3t0WiDPIe3Fto0Q&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82759%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WBkj0%2f4L%2fct4PxVASUcVgA&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82750%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lGpj9oesT9hVNfTx0X1tgQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82751%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3y5GXjs6oT0mf2lEpWy%2b8g&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Do you know what kids are learning in school?
body:
Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. That's why I wanted to do something about it by crea
|
---
| | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.

That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program.

The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America.

We provide this curriculum **free of charge** for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's why I am emailing you today.

I have written a brand-new children's book, [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuipnmae3mkrlc6pt50unq6l6m4vo7e2qn3volc8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im8pr0c3h2bs), to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3n3tukegi7d40r5m085db3b05vk98s5btt3gd0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im8pr0c3h2bs)
__
I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5if4q108lu42qoqgh3mmunge1edib7a98967mb8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im8pr0c3h2bs) with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

###
---
| | [ Today we celebrate Veterans Day ](http://click1.srnemail.com/tmvpvcddvtbkttrdkbbglkjtsvkmcsstzcgrszbhlczvlm_pffllyyjyqjvbhlldqmdfff.html)
### _Friday, November 11, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look at Veterans Day. I talk about the history and share some stories about the people I have served with. These stories go to show that we have the absolute best folks in our military. Join us today for the Celebration. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/kdrpvsbbvzrjzzqbjrrgljfzwvjdswwzhsgqwhrmlshvlf_pffllyyjyqjvbhlldqmdfff.html)

### _Wednesday, November 9, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I give you the hot takes and current look at where the election results stand. Dems do better than expected and Republicans won they house it appears but the battle is just starting! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/tvlpvcddvtbkttrdkbbglkjtsvkmcsstzcgrszbhlczvzw_pffllyyjyqjvbhlldqmdfff.html)
| [ What ever happened to the days of real political debates ](http://click1.srnemail.com/ljzhjnffjldrllcfrddymrqlsjrwnsslknycskdgmnkjkm_pffllyyjyqjvbhlldqmdfff.html)
### _Monday, November 7, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look at the history of Political debate and discuss the current demise of political discourse. I encourage each of you to look at the current state of civil discourse and help search for a better way to educate the public during election cycles. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/drjjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhtmpcpp_pffllyyjyqjvbhlldqmdfff.html)

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848990:Jdu4BpGNQ:m:1:3331421248:260BE1924A072D374241EDDA9B9862CB:r)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849233:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849233:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849234:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849235:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849236:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849233:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849233:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849233:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849233:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849237:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849238:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849239:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849240:Jh2jZpG7N:m:1:3253819041:E85C972E5F5D5F244F4C38354E0362BE:r)

name: ICYMI News
subject: The Rare Phenomenon of Citizenship
body:
I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called “American Citizenship and Its Decline,”

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z35d6pit9i3uhppkltniabfge3sk9os1rushqmr8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi43j0nbg1ohkrcbsrngkmcreiqint7k7iig4hs0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2cph2bs)** ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsg0pbs47kgpoj81t96jt2nqquad5nl4f565tflo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2cph2bs)
---
| | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zahmvj2bq922nkvmld669f7l3ka6dca4bcv98c30_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2cph2bs)**

Best wishes,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot. These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen. In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature. Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed. The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens. You can receive a DVD box set of "American Citizenship and Its Decline " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link: Best wishes, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
These Survival Food Kits Are Famous for Selling Out... Now They're Back in Stock!
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi6a58u6quu496ermhoorhnhhen11gas0up09gso_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ukq72d5hcphb4sj5cpo72p1gm6qb9pjh69q6csb2m8o78pb2c6rr2otkshjm8o37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjgcpqe9ddicup34phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
# Outrage Over Survival Food
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpdkptuuq68qgrl6eil05nb2d39p8v70o79nll90_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs) Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsio12vl7qtroa5lal12g6p8e5f2kc12knal63bo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zskuo26ble7isd5mf26sj08gpf15gbnammuk4sd8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0rsa6n34584gkukok6nau1u3bhudhh0lcde4ok8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1jn5igkouek0hrn6pln277pk8o10li0goqscg70_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you 'll feel right away**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1ob5pr1frk2agdkrbs7dkbnlkpm89i4dbp336lg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zugccabbkshbpsgku19gp6age6mc3sugk07059q0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7j5sbhmfq7to2itjatcm00li7eu85441ococ3io_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im2ob2chh2bs).

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Do you know what kids are learning in school?
body:
Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. That's why I wanted to do something about it by crea
|
---
| | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.

That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program.

The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America.

We provide this curriculum **free of charge** for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's why I am emailing you today.

I have written a brand-new children's book, [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zreqr39poj11nor24edhhdmm1ljcu8ci5l1k0vi0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6chh2bs), to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8nsuj44rc5qsq9ggevlfg83rcop6esov7knmnd8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6chh2bs)
__
I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z205cnhv3nf0v7vipm346r5r7kmfj9s7ejg6qheo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6chh2bs) with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Jessi Melton
subject: Teachers criminalizing parents?
body:
Virginia Democratic delegate Elizabeth Guzman is bringing a new level of insanity to how public schools treat parents.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfobf16vv4hjmllvskkfmd8hs2s6k2kq7ahp11sg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6c1h2bs)
Friend,

Virginia Democratic delegate Elizabeth Guzman is bringing a new level of insanity to how public schools treat parents.

**Guzman wants to expand the definition of child abuse to include _" a parent not honoring a child's request to treat them as the opposite sex."_**

This bill would give teachers more power and criminalize parents who wish to raise their kids in the image that God created them in.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA). We're working with America-First candidates and organizations to keep politicians like Guzman from attacking the rights of parents.

I've set a goal to raise $30,000 this week to help us take back control of our public schools from politicians and the corrupt Teacher's Unions that support them.

[_**I know this is a lot to ask, but America 's parents are under attack! Can you chip in $10, $35, $50, or any amount, Friend? Click here to help protect our children >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zggplk92d0888knjr0ajr8o15patg48agu4ulic8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6c1h2bs)

Guzman knows how harmful this could be for parents:

_" It could be a felony, it could be a misdemeanor, but __**we know that [a] CPS charge could harm your employment, could harm their education**_ _because nowadays many people do a CPS database search before offering employment. "_

**Guzman 's bill is a blatant attack on parents, and this trend will continue unless we do something about it now...**

[_**Will you stand up for the rights of parents? All you have to do is donate today! You can send your urgent gift by clicking here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqub2d9b0ih5osl6vlantalgseepq1qet704cls0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6c1h2bs)

_Are you fed up with the corruption and influence of the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union, and the politicians they support? _

**Parents Union of America is the anti-union. **

We are a vehicle for conservative parents and teachers across the US to systematically restore God as the foundation of our culture, beginning with our education system.

Now, we're fighting to take back public schools for parents and children.

**Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrqrnkuctcieiqtugfuej223e36sbgjqftka72u0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6c1h2bs)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcu0f1psig8tkvn4g7g3oofmove06domh243gvuo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9im6oj6c1h2bs)

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. name: R. Warnock
subject: With a RUNOFF officially announced, we’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you_.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.
**We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign coffers.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54490094/378713060/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2227-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTZkYTcyNi04ZTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0Ygi1bBwBcC7VxzcPA2FtVYzDg5QIS2fYy3MdyVvcQ=)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything it's got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise to fight back against the GOP's megadonors, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Jacky Rosen to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54490095/378713061/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2227-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTZkYTcyNi04ZTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0Ygi1bBwBcC7VxzcPA2FtVYzDg5QIS2fYy3MdyVvcQ=)**
Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=OM7WWfkACQSd6R0buAkakXWGy1EXsIcZLRWvXa1B%2BEiJ%2B0zwKPqIiDkvF05I6THl5hIJh3GJEWuvDsV%2FjE9hJS6%2Bs4PSIjUIEGNMeqJYgn35Aa9E6YP3X%2Fj6xiIUnU7IykAwJZjY%2FtemSllp8iRR0wyz1dWGwhRDf47w3DnV58%2F%2BZdvhPMMb%2BrgTzdh4MdKsknfNUYkT8imOlRTMJYVI5jqexqdtC8QzajjiXwFc%2BciEwGQBfpeZUVFiJc2JjUBS7oln1cr%2BL2RKTq9CvEsmWN81NYLfn%2F9yeqMdo4AryFP7ow7OhQQR2QEVtiav2Z3s9UTYLdVVUUnmHNc9%2BCACZ1s%2BDHF2bUHQccxi9TTSjbgJsVeedoNsQgVq9MoJIPr277iDn3RQAEVIRrFIIVlR7vWYYRm8N%2FTd9ESBl6qsn3o%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

subject: This thing is far from done

body:
|

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850274:6cpCXpGgN:m:1:3317145305:9BA12A44FCDF3A0F65A7FD7BCA15C91B:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850274:6cpCXpGgN:m:1:3317145305:9BA12A44FCDF3A0F65A7FD7BCA15C91B:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850274:6cpCXpGgN:m:1:3317145305:9BA12A44FCDF3A0F65A7FD7BCA15C91B:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850274:6cpCXpGgN:m:1:3317145305:9BA12A44FCDF3A0F65A7FD7BCA15C91B:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850274:6cpCXpGgN:m:1:3317145305:9BA12A44FCDF3A0F65A7FD7BCA15C91B:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It takes SERIOUS RESOURCES after spending so much in such a close race. Republicans will do everything they can to try and steal this victory from us. To ensure Republicans won't and can't steal this election, the Cortez Masto campaign needs your help to make sure the count is fair. Are you with us?
body:
Could be decided by a handful of votes
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4ff309c-7d25-4bfe-8363-a3ba0858130c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, As someone who's worked on local, state and national campaigns I've seen this too many times – when races come down to a few votes and it's too close to call. That's what's happening in Nevada RIGHT NOW, and [with Senate control on the line, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (D) needs our help.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65c7c130-f8a9-4eb8-bdb5-ee02228f686f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [RIGHT NOW.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe4276f2-1f5a-4233-a7ea-7b8a58821658/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) For example, **two years ago, the Republicans took a congressional seat by six votes--six!** A two-vote swing over six votes. **We lost a second seat by only 109 votes!** It takes SERIOUS RESOURCES after spending so much in such a close race. Republicans will do everything they can to try and steal this victory from us. **[To ensure Republicans won't and can't steal this election, can you give $5, $10 or whatever you can afford so we can make sure Senator Cortez Masto has the resources necessary for staff and lawyers during any counting or recounting process?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4756c2ce-80f6-4a3d-88de-4d31d87bf746/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Sen. Cortez Masto Needs Your Help**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9b19030-4961-48c4-873d-23939f2ba808/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **The Cortez Masto campaign spent everything supporters like you and Blue Amp sent them on getting out their message and turning out the vote. There’s nothing left.** And we refuse to let them find a way to toss votes because we don't have the staff and/or lawyers to ensure the process is fair. **[To ensure Republicans won't and can't steal this election, can you give $5, $10 or whatever you can afford so we can make sure Senator Cortez Masto has the resources necessary for staff and lawyers during any counting or recounting process?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0af1ad8c-30b5-4152-9ef2-4f0aaa56b223/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks so much for making sure every vote is counted! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
