name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z77qqrp61ivij379jdn1ls6hr04fadunuh3j2ts8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hm4o35cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjkbqcoq6balitd8rvpv23po79d8pi4ka56lvpn8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hm4o35cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zau8s44fms126746m314r7akugsfki3esdmsrg28_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hm4o35cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Peter,

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

subject: One Final Chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |

| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851099:Jaw8epG7N:m:1:3331421248:2D7C2F0C24985DD6F283C0C39098D56B:r)
---

We are getting a second chance to retake a critical Senate seat in Georgia, and it is critical we don't fall short.

During the 2020 elections, the Georgia Senate race went to a runoff, and our GOP candidates came up short.

**In 2022, we CANNOT allow that to happen again.**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851099:Jaw8epG7N:m:1:3331421248:2D7C2F0C24985DD6F283C0C39098D56B:r)
---

In less than a month, Herschel Walker will once again be on the ballot, and we will have a second shot at unseating radical Left Senator Raphael Warnock.

_We need every patriot to step up and support Herschel 's campaign with a runoff donation today!_

---
| | [PUSH HERSCHEL TO VICTORY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851099:Jaw8epG7N:m:1:3331421248:2D7C2F0C24985DD6F283C0C39098D56B:r)
---

_**Failure is _NOT_ an option.**_
We must flip this seat and make Georgia **RED** again.

So please, don't sit this one out - _**[make a donation to Herschel today to ensure that we have a BIG victory in this must-win race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851099:Jaw8epG7N:m:1:3331421248:2D7C2F0C24985DD6F283C0C39098D56B:r "make a donation to Herschel today to ensure that we have a BIG victory in this must-win race.")**_

This race is far too important to sit on the sidelines.

Fighting For Our Future,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851099:Jaw8epG7N:m:1:3331421248:2D7C2F0C24985DD6F283C0C39098D56B:r)

Mike Pompeo

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849976:63DYepGN2:m:1:3361486117:82BDEEF02602441B31038857DB4E6BED:r) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849976:63DYepGN2:m:1:3361486117:82BDEEF02602441B31038857DB4E6BED:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849976:63DYepGN2:m:1:3361486117:82BDEEF02602441B31038857DB4E6BED:r)**

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851142:Je9MepGNe:m:1:3345639852:D24ADEBDFA7939E12FCBEF942DC32AD2:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851142:Je9MepGNe:m:1:3345639852:D24ADEBDFA7939E12FCBEF942DC32AD2:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851142:Je9MepGNe:m:1:3345639852:D24ADEBDFA7939E12FCBEF942DC32AD2:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851142:Je9MepGNe:m:1:3345639852:D24ADEBDFA7939E12FCBEF942DC32AD2:r)

Herschel Walker

body:
We can hardly believe this:
| **BREAKING FROM THE LAST BOMBSHELL JANUARY 6TH HEARING:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-Jan-6-committee_v2/?source=VPP_20221112_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=5356%2E878179%2EMMfrJq) We know Trump and his MAGA caucus absolutely hate this information coming to light – **so the January 6th committee is at more risk than ever.**

[****Trump’s Republicans will do ANYTHING to shut the investigation down. That’s why we’re circulating an URGENT PETITION calling on 30,000 Democrats to stand with the Jan. 6th Committee »****](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-Jan-6-committee_v2/?source=VPP_20221112_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=5356%2E878179%2EMMfrJq) | [**30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH THE JAN. 6TH COMMITTEE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-Jan-6-committee_v2/?source=VPP_20221112_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=5356%2E878179%2EMMfrJq)
---
* * *
**Donald Trump could FINALLY be locked up** for his treasonous crimes, thanks to the January 6th Committee’s tireless pursuit of the truth!

**But the GOP machine won’t sit idly by** – they’re already trying to destroy the Jan. 6th Committee, so we need to show them a wave of support TODAY!

name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0092%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KYM1g5E%2fOJQw5F0PlHenog&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49303%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3ekRVZL1Cdd2hKzF3v9CXA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49304%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wwug7MerKIq%2fxS%2fSxdAsdA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49315%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2wvq5XkiiuhYBjAULdZrYg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0092%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KYM1g5E%2fOJQw5F0PlHenog&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0092%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KYM1g5E%2fOJQw5F0PlHenog&sysid=1)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Red Wave?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0qjus9bl3mv33h0bbual7q1qfk3n3flkj1dvolo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hmaoj2c5h2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z967lmdr0sc7ojho33mcqvr8cg7603ujkqe2a2h0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hmaoj2c5h2bs) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqmuljmj35cks94r5kephoue5c37jicc0hbd02ao_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hmaoj2c5h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zic6el2opv35becdeasobap3hvmpksb8pmdp8i48_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hmaoj2c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
Dear Peter, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he 's been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood's nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We're fighting back, but we'll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)** [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853204:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853205:6ivJSpGtN:m:1:3317145305:4A0150A01C0A22A357A08D2A35C9B9BF:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 1, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6ivJSpGtN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6ivJSpGtN)

By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6nd09bs7oj2ukkc91ig3hck0is71e6qo1lkgckg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hm6p36cph2bs) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2bvattukcmqq6bs2jdleasrff4igt5l6i6a9en8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hm6p36cph2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z68s9bjs0l66u90225e2s3i1dv5opi1sb23l9mr0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9hm6p36cph2bs)**

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853687:JeS_qpG8N:m:1:3374012347:B87AA6652987130E0A21B29F63F1BF8A:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853687:JeS_qpG8N:m:1:3374012347:B87AA6652987130E0A21B29F63F1BF8A:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853687:JeS_qpG8N:m:1:3374012347:B87AA6652987130E0A21B29F63F1BF8A:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853687:JeS_qpG8N:m:1:3374012347:B87AA6652987130E0A21B29F63F1BF8A:r)

Herschel Walker

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could – just like last election cycle – have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty – and non-stop.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d04db3621a045f886d5dd74842b6c17&_e=vYzMgc7_zJ4XOSM6BomVtMir7zHh2rPAQQ_KUnXVJpEbCDPNKYpGeTxz-KvUa7TxupjeGQykFDs8Gx_OkFW0WL1tI3txeLe5muTr4pbpC1mmXW_fIon3uyYV-ml5JFLYfC29jQWnIA2FjIfzpCZbytS-af-hEjz5k_ZLD54M8c_3UwHchvSOO0Zhyvr3lFUCc5WYVS1u8GxOv4ri--0sjxb5WYtF-kI5yKTDnUBmPC0bpbiD44jILLrArzILOL6uSSlx4KVvNqfElpgLyq5dh9diDUi0C76BXQTjRhojwwCo7vf0gp1U5mhYBZbCZXFniD1WkbYT1CfMuxBWU_royCPfP2Exd_WwcMPa6S-F3efAH7MlxLajJ0I4SUkMH4PiEI-UJ_NVETZ8WYLuOMXesIpQbbjbnmACzDg7TfWFEMwSYWamnDhXrWkrUnozfharu94j1Pzc_nJhGmf3i6xhtNZm5_btUQ_RCrG7x9wcDw9Nk01b3zLFq-ZdACUojG22) **

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Do you know what kids are learning in school?
body:
Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. |
---
| | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.

That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program.

The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America.

We provide this curriculum **free of charge** for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's why I am emailing you today.

I have written a brand-new children's book, [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9ddd4ee2f447ffb541dc243062be9c&_e=jzVNxK_CkBJ6bkK4tWqJO7sVaMxbBgqHAQK33Hw_phXxps6eObmI11rTnUacVVgzHDDQ-VXeD8ZUdRwwVXfkTLvnXzCkUE2r7uijP-7ZnNx9P_xIJvOp3F-RyO9y06CEYlGImcCXvJaPvu5YgBkyxl-r49MOHy75YniGUeMjzI8hKkZkdov1utMnFv9hBqIGiXyUfAznmzPCOARNJCShQwptHsseQPwwbLTNZHjq5ElBxVfGh6IcRp5U1s-36TO8mh8DBZp9c5rz_ds4D6RnpUQ9Cv-LMIcrxnFFjkzvjva32AMba81-Z3gKVeUSQ_QCicbyRSmLV4p9jCFzRB6thpjMcQACFWk85Qqg0vD9pyJykQIUhuG5sU7WM5rRc-6q), to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9ddd4ee2f447ffb541dc243062be9c&_e=jzVNxK_CkBJ6bkK4tWqJO7sVaMxbBgqHAQK33Hw_phXxps6eObmI11rTnUacVVgzHDDQ-VXeD8ZUdRwwVXfkTLvnXzCkUE2r7uijP-7ZnNx9P_xIJvOp3F-RyO9y06CEYlGImcCXvJaPvu5YgBkyxl-r49MOHy75YniGUeMjzI8hKkZkdov1utMnFv9hBqIGiXyUfAznmzPCOARNJCShQwZdFkDdz_Y5badvABmOi-lEPVII8xaEqDSawPeOSj0l3Lb78t9ozc6W9SfpqtspaOhDWTcPEBtCQ5N8AvrUf1adbWcdGUEMRoTEpOM6_MM2gsGO_nJqtgJsaX7wveaNUc8QKEh7FQEPGWElhGnbdH8T4dNEuNEaua1zGgm5rGx5)
__
I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9ddd4ee2f447ffb541dc243062be9c&_e=jzVNxK_CkBJ6bkK4tWqJO7sVaMxbBgqHAQK33Hw_phXxps6eObmI11rTnUacVVgzHDDQ-VXeD8ZUdRwwVXfkTLvnXzCkUE2r7uijP-7ZnNx9P_xIJvOp3F-RyO9y06CEYlGImcCXvJaPvu5YgBkyxl-r49MOHy75YniGUeMjzI8hKkZkdov1utMnFv9hBqIGiXyUfAznmzPCOARNJCShQwOfL3DLwyyDBLnMQX1tRGuidbMUSwU1nbJVb8sWTvCNycvdYqKyK6_Z9JdtZajI1rjs5v0wgCxjrd0oD0rinRF9BYX8kEijjNKTbuIT3u4fEyj39Z6JrjJbASwwwcmDRPHFHaLStSHKeCP7H2nvT7MOgRoBq_N_1XCvc2jEbNYm) with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Rare Phenomenon of Citizenship
body:
I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e6df78fcd3a4fb3a587a4ca350b961c&_e=Zvevlmmo3Mtwn7xa9Ki-Ox8-ZtMVM0cU8vv99bXSOY6WzscS9ojoGYhFAEw9QitTbM1cc_IBr5_oTCSNpWg6jQl_rvw67oT8uioriLfJYYfpr0t6OGcRuJtaRM2IILAKQqdEh5d7-EI7MVo8uyhongwL0pNuGgDFGIMy4kOFd6qt8_NrXhhNdDY3rpDMEzFmLPpKYQemCQV6FFItbYlJYbD-DY6IaMf9vbGGXOtp-6w9xjnJA3Ah5zLmxv20py8hya4yS63MDdXHGdtNSeyFBs1ByLJsJhi4PxatPD8bzpXhAGuNsZhjEiAZvm6KfUBC8nqvEz6dzxA_thuQIKfKfka3L68ZiTCDeQCUhxqXgmS4qn7oRbfU_GwDnj1KwQeXd0TXNYeXmHK-Yjr4RZEtQQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e6df78fcd3a4fb3a587a4ca350b961c&_e=Zvevlmmo3Mtwn7xa9Ki-Ox8-ZtMVM0cU8vv99bXSOY6WzscS9ojoGYhFAEw9QitTbM1cc_IBr5_oTCSNpWg6jQl_rvw67oT8uioriLfJYYfpr0t6OGcRuJtaRM2IILAKQqdEh5d7-EI7MVo8uyhongwL0pNuGgDFGIMy4kOFd6qt8_NrXhhNdDY3rpDMEzFmLPpKYQemCQV6FFItbYlJYbD-DY6IaMf9vbGGXOtp-6w9xjnJA3Ah5zLmxv20py8hN0-irSyJnSS5spckWFUkZk1TlU8MZL2iIazQnL-Sw31-fQPeKVPhgQQAWYZCaPxAgk6eopc0DAHVi__Z5yK1nQuRQkOpZobJ-fFG_9N-0TmlTMC2tnnHXKbEPRsgHypk6KfWGZ4Gt62il5zRjWyGLQ%3D%3D)** ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e6df78fcd3a4fb3a587a4ca350b961c&_e=Zvevlmmo3Mtwn7xa9Ki-Ox8-ZtMVM0cU8vv99bXSOY6WzscS9ojoGYhFAEw9QitTbM1cc_IBr5_oTCSNpWg6jQl_rvw67oT8uioriLfJYYfpr0t6OGcRuJtaRM2IILAKQqdEh5d7-EI7MVo8uyhongwL0pNuGgDFGIMy4kOFd6qt8_NrXhhNdDY3rpDMEzFmLPpKYQemCQV6FFItbYlJYbD-DY6IaMf9vbGGXOtp-6w9xjnJA3Ah5zLmxv20py8h-K_vUCchrZrTG3nPk79gS21_T0jSwxXhQFlazgzjsDk5_v82vP2mD52-nYniiTbOZVfPQgpn0-hmtiZnDMUi5UA49zhMtLodaxLHP7M-UPmc9i8X0sIgjL1uOVu8RXisYiP4ZlcVx2EPDF3kcQ9UUA%3D%3D)
---
| | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e6df78fcd3a4fb3a587a4ca350b961c&_e=Zvevlmmo3Mtwn7xa9Ki-Ox8-ZtMVM0cU8vv99bXSOY6WzscS9ojoGYhFAEw9QitTbM1cc_IBr5_oTCSNpWg6jQl_rvw67oT8uioriLfJYYfpr0t6OGcRuJtaRM2IILAKQqdEh5d7-EI7MVo8uyhongwL0pNuGgDFGIMy4kOFd6qt8_NrXhhNdDY3rpDMEzFmLPpKYQemCQV6FFItbYlJYbD-DY6IaMf9vbGGXOtp-6w9xjnJA3Ah5zLmxv20py8hudYVt3s70RQEWkcgpqQSOSJkk9mJUxuMCeKad9-6XbOJ6F1yTWhqQA7F3kWyRwEgTZCcv7o_i0ldAb_stD2gyg5K_YpOnI11QPvZ-_0cg6Aw_Ze59XNvPg-EbDmF9DMFEwA7CBKrs4Eiqg3A2xYp-w%3D%3D)**

Best wishes,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning

clean_body: I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called " ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, the recently released The Dying Citizen. Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen. | | | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government. Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past. Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot. These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen. In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature. Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed. The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Do you know what kids are learning in school?
body:
Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. |
---
| | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.

That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program.

The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America.

We provide this curriculum **free of charge** for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's why I am emailing you today.

I have written a brand-new children's book, [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ead5dd0468e4c35982010b306ce47ed&_e=R6jjy6ObC-G7hNjnMd65XDgaXHq5l-m22760-l1aNraTLCMjylTg_oZXFUMOpYeNZNaYgA7n9YIgTkeE1B-zhS4sSC8V4w8nMl7R3pqOPB3xprK72E9u_7EtxCj6vtzPfv9vRA0NEuYu3Tpx2-_mFlLduu8BADd37qIzsjLgrTxv0WzU9wig0aHRHmw6M5uM_Pa4DxisZ4VuDUoKc7wI1gA8idFvs9wu1xAyIF6GsTofSc9mMcW41NKMqy9_Z093QSFSwUDhdBLTwLD32osJFh6l0f2-SOls22oQbwx8AcvyySoXzyubGp1559Ie5cmIV8H2w-VAJ4aOe8iYJJEq8KEwnUWbJSlMpj2FslW9F9gepH4vwvCu-sC4pJ2QeiOc), to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ead5dd0468e4c35982010b306ce47ed&_e=R6jjy6ObC-G7hNjnMd65XDgaXHq5l-m22760-l1aNraTLCMjylTg_oZXFUMOpYeNZNaYgA7n9YIgTkeE1B-zhS4sSC8V4w8nMl7R3pqOPB3xprK72E9u_7EtxCj6vtzPfv9vRA0NEuYu3Tpx2-_mFlLduu8BADd37qIzsjLgrTxv0WzU9wig0aHRHmw6M5uM_Pa4DxisZ4VuDUoKc7wI1qUncezuZTp6Qn-mjEsFL0HpqYQCsKnAXSsvgM3I6ApS_ucBvevPG4NRjO-CfjFnrxG240bjrvOlTstCmac5TMXw2y30T_iNTr5Wilsj8F5oJ9_HW_lPVNrQC-t78ue8chliWkyy4Ctw120y_O-fZLOga3nISA8hgyIRWU4Cth9F)
__
I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ead5dd0468e4c35982010b306ce47ed&_e=R6jjy6ObC-G7hNjnMd65XDgaXHq5l-m22760-l1aNraTLCMjylTg_oZXFUMOpYeNZNaYgA7n9YIgTkeE1B-zhS4sSC8V4w8nMl7R3pqOPB3xprK72E9u_7EtxCj6vtzPfv9vRA0NEuYu3Tpx2-_mFlLduu8BADd37qIzsjLgrTxv0WzU9wig0aHRHmw6M5uM_Pa4DxisZ4VuDUoKc7wI1m07ljHw49dqsPhUe7KG1G0Zd3vxdbr69REd9T4jvgOksJ_sJLethAmv2xC4VPLqtjZTPoGTPAQDeZPssUR7jWpnDsHMugWCS6aLvuecdhJIKUa5GCSxVGD_zjQjIw17VYOusPmGlOdZMnvY-_lPLIyNbsUu6ZYR1wI2cVCKTl6f) with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

| | Derek, Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. **But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:[_Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Senator Warner’s, so we have the resources to count every vote and defeat our election-denying opponent?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54501384/378760443/-1659689945?refcode=mw_em_221112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzk0OTE0Yy1hNzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGZDxz4Bkyvk5EE-Zt27Dg4jqEc7JmZ82DZaqjRaslI=)** My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election. With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted. But, Derek our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. **Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:****[_Can you split $5 between my campaign and Senator Warners’s right now to get us started so we have the resources to count every last vote in our must-win race?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54501385/378760445/-1659689945?refcode=mw_em_221112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzk0OTE0Yy1hNzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGZDxz4Bkyvk5EE-Zt27Dg4jqEc7JmZ82DZaqjRaslI=)** Thank you so much. _¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54501386/378760446/-1659689945?refcode=mw_em_221112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzk0OTE0Yy1hNzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eGZDxz4Bkyvk5EE-Zt27Dg4jqEc7JmZ82DZaqjRaslI=)**

clean_body: | | | Derek, Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:= My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election. With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted. But, Derek our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:= Thank you so much. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Peter,
My race against far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock is going to a RUNOFF.
_**This race is going to decide the future of our country, Peter, and we cannot afford to have any dedicated patriots like you sit on the sidelines.**_
Please, the future of our country is on the line, and we desperately need your support.
If we are going to win on December 6th, **ALL** of our **TOP** supporters need to stand with Senate Republicans and my campaign from now until then. This is ALL OR NOTHING.
Our records indicate that you're in the 95th percentile of active donors in YOUR CITY. With the runoff election soon, we HAVE to keep pace with Raphael Warnock's mega-millionaire donors if we're going to take back our Majority, and that's why we're calling on you, Peter. _Please. We desperately need you when it counts the most._
[_**Contribute $45 or more in the NEXT 20 MINUTES to help us crush our CRITICAL fundraising goal and restore President Trump 's majority in the Senate. >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853388:JK3g4pGNM:m:1:3331703221:5E289F9F75CE9D73A811CD4B0C85F0F1:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851171:J30V5pGNr:m:1:3346849603:A404F650216569AFC6553ECF49383877:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851171:J30V5pGNr:m:1:3346849603:A404F650216569AFC6553ECF49383877:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851171:J30V5pGNr:m:1:3346849603:A404F650216569AFC6553ECF49383877:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851171:J30V5pGNr:m:1:3346849603:A404F650216569AFC6553ECF49383877:r)

Herschel Walker

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk0eln0o6j5ntntcn8jipblfevk3o9ojtr63rbro_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm8pb4chh2bs) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2iip0mmap5fjmdlvsrebbb0q7e9qbl6hktr4u2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm8pb4chh2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z051sot1i018ce42u71i069cus5gjl8ufducosho_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm8pb4chh2bs)**

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you._
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between me and Kirsten Gillibrand right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54502975/378767401/1384586616?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3762-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVkMDIzMC1hYzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IxmRbD48Jq9IKOSYc0xV4JrEZsrgKnw-Ydfe62AGOwU=)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54502976/378767402/1384586616?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3762-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVkMDIzMC1hYzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IxmRbD48Jq9IKOSYc0xV4JrEZsrgKnw-Ydfe62AGOwU=)**
Thank you for your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=e37kiKT8%2FuBmZBEr1XRnFb0rDYvJ1h%2Bm%2FpFy45pqAeTf30v48%2Fn19CiYpTVu6UucK2X276oH1GgM5L4dxpnJnDzZEND9ZrDEF89z7gLKOpTX0tbMAqrLs2eDDKyLpRZRCqUxwFGljSd9xJqHhkcBaPDiTPzLDpjvMUCGL1cdnlBkLbb%2FIT9fA1unoN9jPcprMrhpaLODYJq%2B7Le9kx6JQ%2F%2FQfrI83%2Bjm13kQM33DtwUwQNZPy9d6xEAzKrKBr88f95JVYUixDeD2o9AHIKXbtdZL1reEEtPSGlQcxkcR0vLn193SvCqtK2x5BqasBVCzq5HIhzW9t08GmXes56K54owHbx%2BxucKf8jU%2BwBbr7jgzhAKkX5G7BSoA0Esir9O9hjzpO5sQ1txrlOUWqfY2K3EmxG90HKFj5xJn77v8x9E%3D).

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54489100/378708526/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWViMjEyYS04MTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5kGNl1ao2jDDflNnqcvqLYIIcwyezMbTDSV-l6oLK4=&emci=91ea7cff-3262-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=5aeb212a-8162-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

body:

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. **24 days.**
That's how long we have to defend this seat before Dec. 6th’s runoff election.
**7 million.**

**$200,000.**

body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
|
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d9a38a687ef44ed86b6454343e2a949&_e=GPMU9XkwuCq-1BiqBqY3qHZIqe3hDuxFg2SZ-Ce7VqwXSHC3TRot6MLoGJOAZbzvMg-ihUke4hRVaJPaJS1sFzDz0itlU-8LbTVGzzVnSq-iapDCFO0I159859twZLj4ePukKPVZ30W2jYnOG3jT66ebeOm7lf_MAepgmSTjONWiX7H1AQJg8wG3ZTNVKbaiyAauDaxDUIuHkYnN5fySF9ZGCi3SB5Vhi4zo_CRdzcj3_VDAhZ0WdvDvqXck4m2is65clm5Os7_IqRGum_OZIxpbO_dgy2GQ6NGCw2dKizBKQh4b_WXnXigjSrzPQAEAxER3SerxXJc3XZ7yBQgOVcIiEUt1iyIPZbszQE0NVpxKGdOCVh4cTP_IL2iMc6RU8U1NaRh5cQ63AhnnhWFKvyu72et9qWwtbz3KjIayCKEiVR2DLm97XsF1_XFbyj0FlxNaThedqVAuxmKE19VjXj1in4h4r5H3-jvrWIE3GI4%3D)

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d9a38a687ef44ed86b6454343e2a949&_e=GPMU9XkwuCq-1BiqBqY3qHZIqe3hDuxFg2SZ-Ce7VqwXSHC3TRot6MLoGJOAZbzvMg-ihUke4hRVaJPaJS1sFzDz0itlU-8LbTVGzzVnSq-iapDCFO0I159859twZLj4ePukKPVZ30W2jYnOG3jT66ebeOm7lf_MAepgmSTjONWiX7H1AQJg8wG3ZTNVKbaiyAauDaxDUIuHkYnN5fySF9ZGCi3SB5Vhi4zo_CRdzcj3_VDAhZ0WdvDvqXck4m2is65clm5Os7_IqRGum_OZIxpbO_dgy2GQ6NGCw2dKizBKQh4b_WXnXigjSrzPQAEAxER3SerxXJc3XZ7yBQgOVZH00shdqwK2yysytd0lG32i7NtxLFytCBn6yU_lgZwuZxq7VWbzwQLKrrwA1tVQ6Ff0f36gyPVwn1pXEWJ-GrICYLyYuldYwvKVczXsboW1f_odZeWVCntWU-wbwyv5Pc9JuyTEAoJ6P0JCqQQsl9s%3D) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d9a38a687ef44ed86b6454343e2a949&_e=GPMU9XkwuCq-1BiqBqY3qHZIqe3hDuxFg2SZ-Ce7VqwXSHC3TRot6MLoGJOAZbzvMg-ihUke4hRVaJPaJS1sFzDz0itlU-8LbTVGzzVnSq-iapDCFO0I159859twZLj4ePukKPVZ30W2jYnOG3jT66ebeOm7lf_MAepgmSTjONWiX7H1AQJg8wG3ZTNVKbaiyAauDaxDUIuHkYnN5fySF9ZGCi3SB5Vhi4zo_CRdzcj3_VDAhZ0WdvDvqXck4m2is65clm5Os7_IqRGum_OZIxpbO_dgy2GQ6NGCw2dKizBKQh4b_WXnXigjSrzPQAEAxER3SerxXJc3XZ7yBQgOVXj1OUZuf8Xosrlh_F4hV9h7P9vPmuSDt3BNuaJ7ksRojkvYjiXlYkBAbkmTj3bWHUYLUKaoW_UTlpsmMwlc0eEwItLWNTWS1ddTP9jSRL_xXeMzkV6YEJ9RTmJtAAlPshLv3bWqBnAdU4-CjZliVYs%3D)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

subject: I'm humbly asking

body:
It’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
| | |
---
Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking: ****[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Letitia James to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54504464/378772686/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk913-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVlYTJlMC1iMzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuKd_hhK_B1QAAcW-H_hwFmI37OoQfWZCu-BY_KFHfo=)**
That's why GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going ****_all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**** **
**[Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $5 or more now between me and Letitia so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54504465/378772716/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk913-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVlYTJlMC1iMzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuKd_hhK_B1QAAcW-H_hwFmI37OoQfWZCu-BY_KFHfo=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m running low
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851166:JuRm0pGcN:m:1:3359512271:64A64C910387680F7163CFA736C93EA1:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851166:JuRm0pGcN:m:1:3359512271:64A64C910387680F7163CFA736C93EA1:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851166:JuRm0pGcN:m:1:3359512271:64A64C910387680F7163CFA736C93EA1:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851166:JuRm0pGcN:m:1:3359512271:64A64C910387680F7163CFA736C93EA1:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851166:JuRm0pGcN:m:1:3359512271:64A64C910387680F7163CFA736C93EA1:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851166:JuRm0pGcN:m:1:3359512271:64A64C910387680F7163CFA736C93EA1:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lauren=20Boebert?=
subject: Top Story on Fox News: RAZOR THIN lead
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e4f18eee64&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter —My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so** _**razor**_****_**thin**_**it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[ This is where I need your help.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=27d7675152&e=fdefed58de)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=58be7f4b6b&e=fdefed58de) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need**[**your help once again**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7c8f430c75&e=fdefed58de)**. Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle.**
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c8ece76bd8&e=fdefed58de)
Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Joey, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1504e6e559&e=fdefed58de).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need**[**your support**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8b6e0e02f6&e=fdefed58de)**to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c461a72104&e=fdefed58de)

subject: It’s official

body:
If you want to flip the Senate, this is our last and best chance. |
---

**I didn't get in this Senate race to lose.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What to make of the mid-terms? – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132672?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**How frustrating.... This week’s mid-term election results saw the conservative movement make slow progress, but nothing like what some polls and pundits were predicting.**

Far from seeing a ‘red wave’, it is touch-and-go as to whether the Republicans have flipped the House. Who controls the Senate may well hinge on a run-off in Georgia.
---
|
---
Florida's Ron DeSantis shows conservatives how to win
| All that aside, the liberty movement should not be too despondent. If the Republicans do indeed win the House, it would mean “Good bye, Speaker Nancy Pelosi”. Given the pivotal role that the House Speaker plays introducing bills, having a conservative Speaker has huge implications. **Flipping the House would help prevent the progressives from being able to inflict further damage over the next two years.**

For me, the most significant results were Governor Ron DeSantis’ landslide win in Florida, and Governor Greg Abbott’s Texas triumph.

**Once considered ‘swing’ states, Florida and Texas show that conservatives win when they stay true to their principles.** No one in America has done more to fight back against ‘woke’ ideology than Ron DeSantis. He took on Disney when they went ‘woke’ and he has taken action against Critical Race theory in the classroom.

**DeSantis and Abbott prove that the battle for America’s future needs to be fought and won at the state level. **With that in mind, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy will shortly be publishing a ‘Conservative Platform’ for our state.

Here in Mississippi, this week’s election saw few surprises. **But if conservatives in our state want to be part of a conservative movement that renews America, they should seek inspiration from what worked in Florida and Texas.**

This week, for example, it was announced that Mississippi’s state revenue for the fiscal year 2024 is estimated to be $7.5 billion. This year, meanwhile, total revenue collections for the month of October FY 2023 are $84,478,628 or 14.39% above the sine die revenue estimate. **There is plenty of scope for further tax cuts in Mississippi, which is precisely what Governor Tate Reeves is now calling for.**

Conservative law makers in our state would be wise to follow the DeSantis / Abbott example and send money back to the taxpayers. **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy will also be publishing a draft budget for our state, modelled on the tried and tested approach we have seen in Florida and Texas.**

Don’t be too downhearted about this week’s election results. They show the liberty movement what works – and how we can win.

Have a great weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4f121233a7&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| Ps. What do you think about the idea of letting local people recall their mayor? Have a read of my article in which I float the idea [here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d5e51a2f93&e=5703353baa)

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, How frustrating.... This week’s mid-term election results saw the conservative movement make slow progress, but nothing like what some polls and pundits were predicting. Far from seeing a ‘red wave’, it is touch-and-go as to whether the Republicans have flipped the House. Who controls the Senate may well hinge on a run-off in Georgia. | Florida's Ron DeSantis shows conservatives how to win | All that aside, the liberty movement should not be too despondent. If the Republicans do indeed win the House, it would mean “Good bye, Speaker Nancy Pelosi”. Given the pivotal role that the House Speaker plays introducing bills, having a conservative Speaker has huge implications. Flipping the House would help prevent the progressives from being able to inflict further damage over the next two years. For me, the most significant results were Governor Ron DeSantis’ landslide win in Florida, and Governor Greg Abbott’s Texas triumph. Once considered ‘swing’ states, Florida and Texas show that conservatives win when they stay true to their principles. No one in America has done more to fight back against ‘woke’ ideology than Ron DeSantis. He took on Disney when they went ‘woke’ and he has taken action against Critical Race theory in the classroom. DeSantis and Abbott prove that the battle for America’s future needs to be fought and won at the state level. With that in mind, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy will shortly be publishing a ‘Conservative Platform’ for our state. Here in Mississippi, this week’s election saw few surprises. But if conservatives in our state want to be part of a conservative movement that renews America, they should seek inspiration from what worked in Florida and Texas. This week, for example, it was announced that Mississippi’s state revenue for the fiscal year 2024 is estimated to be $7.5 billion. This year, meanwhile, total revenue collections for the month of October FY 2023 are $84,478,628 or 14.39% above the sine die revenue estimate. There is plenty of scope for further tax cuts in Mississippi, which is precisely what Governor Tate Reeves is now calling for. Conservative law makers in our state would be wise to follow the DeSantis / Abbott example and send money back to the taxpayers. The Mississippi Center for Public Policy will also be publishing a draft budget for our state, modelled on the tried and tested approach we have seen in Florida and Texas. Don’t be too downhearted about this week’s election results. They show the liberty movement what works – and how we can win. Have a great weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | Ps. What do you think about the idea of letting local people recall their mayor? Have a read of my article in which I float the idea | | |

name: Christine Drazan
subject: Thank you.
body:
With more than 85% percent of the vote reported, it’s now clear that we’ve come up just short in the Oregon governor’s race.
[](https://christinedrazanforgovernoror.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nitjiyk-iukrjimdh-r/) _With more than 85% percent of the vote reported, it 's now clear that we've come up just short in the Oregon governor's race. [_**Watch my concession address here.**_](https://christinedrazanforgovernoror.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nitjiyk-iukrjimdh-j/)_ ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ [](https://christinedrazanforgovernoror.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nitjiyk-iukrjimdh-t/) _While this was not the result we had fought so hard and hoped for,**I want to express my deepest gratitude to all those who supported me and put their trust in our campaign.**__I also want to assure Oregonians that every vote will be counted and that their voices were heard in this election. _But unfortunately, given what we know about the ballots outstanding, the math for a comeback simply does not add up. Though the campaign for Governor of Oregon has come to an end, _I am immensely grateful for all the Oregonians who joined our movement to take our state in a new direction -you included! __**Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support in this race.** I hope you continue to stay engaged and in this fight, for better schools, safer communities and for the future of our state, one that we all love dearly.__Thank you,_ Christine Drazan | [Unsubscribe](https://christinedrazanforgovernoror.cmail19.com/t/y-u-nitjiyk-iukrjimdh-i/)
---
clean_body: With more than 85% percent of the vote reported, it’s now clear that we’ve come up just short in the Oregon governor’s race. With more than 85% percent of the vote reported, it 's now clear that we've come up just short in the Oregon governor's race. ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ While this was not the result we had fought so hard and hoped for,I want to express my deepest gratitude to all those who supported me and put their trust in our campaign.I also want to assure Oregonians that every vote will be counted and that their voices were heard in this election. But unfortunately, given what we know about the ballots outstanding, the math for a comeback simply does not add up. Though the campaign for Governor of Oregon has come to an end, I am immensely grateful for all the Oregonians who joined our movement to take our state in a new direction -you included! Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support in this race. I hope you continue to stay engaged and in this fight, for better schools, safer communities and for the future of our state, one that we all love dearly.Thank you,_ Christine Drazan |

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z50prfhkd2he2ji3elttp9q0bnqvgoehda40mn7o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs) **
