The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhrb457psa5v0dlmbnp63gl8itdsmucddqhlm0bo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8kvlmslmnkjj3bbebrnsjrid8m6ple0ik7egjb0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za882sos1uumtjftrdma955175pss23b8amj03s0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853750:60tYgpGmN:m:1:3372944669:6D92F7AE030D04824B380DEF2B6450D2:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853750:60tYgpGmN:m:1:3372944669:6D92F7AE030D04824B380DEF2B6450D2:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853750:60tYgpGmN:m:1:3372944669:6D92F7AE030D04824B380DEF2B6450D2:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853750:60tYgpGmN:m:1:3372944669:6D92F7AE030D04824B380DEF2B6450D2:r)

Herschel Walker

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Herschel Walker
subject: One more chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjjjnp9dav06qhnge825nj12fgt16pt7i6eigia8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf25r1c5i09nbmmessbpbu68hvflp8oqtoegft08_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6798j1768518eq193lq0gdj1r99hfsc3j3hudb0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zba2nokfutjl6u3rcdu4a6gscmei7l5d72h8spjo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9t39j202tnhr6ot224si82pr4n7cg286vu5m30_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstov3ev2p0hlgdt36qnctdj7tsckjla42t8mv8o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpbogpm9491ls7t5qg8m8dsg765ptpodio01ukio_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdpb6ldurakt71k0066n9m6fil6dh5uq2lvh8f8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5j8h84unreck6k39a3h4kon9444v7vrlppvahv0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmifp0u5ei69njo9hstqsukhnnarltmgd4i0e22o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4eh6sg8sh79mecleik56v3f5b72gcdef2ilnhig_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhp347bq9fto2l3dba7td9j07bp9el8o7al3pe48_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq5hrosr0d9qhh8b4jjjc2smfvtqjpsqbvamda7g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9jm9or4c9h2bs)

Fellow American,

**I didn't get in this Senate race to lose.**

Even after being outspent $101 million to $32 million in the general election, we still almost beat an incumbent senator in a battleground state. But since no candidate received a majority of the vote on Tuesday, we now will have a runoff election in 24 days.

The vote on Tuesday was CLOSE. Just 0.9% separated Raphael Warnock and me. ---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853353:6-pNNLGzN:m:1:3317145305:FAEB8F6E437FCA3CD65F62524F71C392:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853353:6-pNNLGzN:m:1:3317145305:FAEB8F6E437FCA3CD65F62524F71C392:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853353:6-pNNLGzN:m:1:3317145305:FAEB8F6E437FCA3CD65F62524F71C392:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853353:6-pNNLGzN:m:1:3317145305:FAEB8F6E437FCA3CD65F62524F71C392:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853444:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853444:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853445:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853446:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853447:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853444:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853444:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853444:6u16NLGeN:m:1:3331703221:D74DA198645DB68969A9E36AB1F4460A:r)

Herschel Walker

# A Heartbreaking Loss
---
| [DONATE](https://thepoliticalmatrix.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3bea68b6a04118d41358241a&id=793c7430bd&e=10b14e738f "DONATE")

| While the rest of America moved forward Tuesday, Florida took a giant leap back. Words cannot express how shocked and disappointed we all have been to watch the election unfold in our beautiful state. Though Florida may have let us down, those of you who have worked for, volunteered with, donated to, or supported our campaign made miracles happen on this campaign trail. We outperformed every democrat on the ballot in Northwest Florida, and that’s entirely thanks to supporters like you. We used our campaign as a catalyst for good – and the good we’ve done in our community does not stop because the election is over. This fight was never just about one candidate, one issue, one election. This fight was about saving our state and this nation from the necrosis eating at its soul, consuming what is good and decent in this world and leaving nothing but rot for our children. Our fight is far from over. We’ll continue serving our community in Northwest Florida as we prepare to keep fighting. This community has shown me what the power of good can do, and I will be forever grateful for that. Please consider helping us balance our books and prepare for our next steps if you’re able[. Click here](https://thepoliticalmatrix.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3bea68b6a04118d41358241a&id=dbb9ed2350&e=10b14e738f) to donate before we close our accounts for this cycle. | | | Peter, [**Let's ensure we hold the Senate, and potentially even gain a seat, by re-electing Raphael Warnock in his runoff election on December 6th.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcce49b93-67d5-43e2-80cf-5f36a514d2d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Tuesday we beat election deniers and demagogic democracy-haters across the country. But in Herschel Walker--who threatened to murder multiple women and denies the results of the 2020 election--there's one more anti-democracy, Trumpian MAGA-nut left to send into electoral oblivion. **_A Democratic majority may come down to Georgia. If it doesn't, imagine gaining a seat in the Senate and getting that much closer to ending the filibuster, passing voting rights, codifying Roe, further fighting climate change, banning assault rifles, making the $15 minimum wage national, enacting paid family leave and so much more..._** **Yes, we had a great night, Tuesday. But we're not done yet. WE MUST WIN THIS ONE LAST RACE, and then we can rest for a bit before gearing up for the next fight.** As we saw this week, the GOP is sending Ted Cruz in to campaign for Walker to rally their base. They’re going to throw millions of dollars at this race and the Warnock campaign started on Wednesday at square one again; they spent everything they raised to get voters to the polls. Now they have to do it all again. _**If we want Joe Biden’s agenda to survive Sen. Joe Manchin’s stonewalling for the next two years ...**_ _**If we want Joe Biden’s judicial nominees to make it through the Senate ...**_ _**If we want to prevent national abortion bans ...**_ ... it’s important to help as much as we can and as soon as possible. [**Can you please join us in supporting Senator Warnock by rushing him a contribution of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T003dc42d-9e9a-4e38-bfed-64fdcaf37629/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks so much. Blue Amp Action Community!** All my best, Cliff Schecter

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

subject: This thing is far from done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851183:JkggNLGNe:m:1:3368395361:9C6D3100742500B577B4EA133950FA11:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851183:JkggNLGNe:m:1:3368395361:9C6D3100742500B577B4EA133950FA11:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851183:JkggNLGNe:m:1:3368395361:9C6D3100742500B577B4EA133950FA11:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851183:JkggNLGNe:m:1:3368395361:9C6D3100742500B577B4EA133950FA11:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851183:JkggNLGNe:m:1:3368395361:9C6D3100742500B577B4EA133950FA11:r)

name: President Jessica Post
subject: I’m coming to you with some great news!
body:
My team and I have had a long week, but I wanted to email you with a short update. | | |
---
| | It’s DLCC President Jessica Post here. My team and I have had a long week, but I’m coming to you with some great news! As of 10:00am today, State Democrats have:
* **FLIPPED three chambers to Democratic control – the Minnesota Senate, Michigan House, and Michigan Senate – creating two new Democratic trifectas in critical states!**

* **Won must-hold Democratic legislatures** in Colorado, Maine, Nevada and New Mexico – some of our top targets this year!

* **Protected the veto power of two Democratic governors in key states** – Wisconsin and North Carolina – giving them a critical tool to fight back against extreme Republican legislation.

These victories were only possible thanks to you and this grassroots team. We were able to make targeted investments in campaigns, knock on over a million doors, and get organizers on the ground to turn out swing voters. **And it worked – thanks to you we were able to defend and pick up key chambers that will protect the future of voting rights, abortion access, and more.** [But ballots are still being tabulated in some of our most competitive states and we must make sure every last vote is counted. Please, rush $7 or whatever you can afford now to ensure state Democrats are ready for the hours and days ahead >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIq45qgM0LGkgd86qa5aoDp-j1ZFUFhGdBoX3mIVs-OKHuir39c5222joLFR__XfLKvloRCPQLuaS8DxQ-agdbWgGqKNFjtaMa5b8k3T8NnRrqfsSzQbtXxXmK9iW97uCILGeckYFD_QJGs8Rnhf6mvSm74Gnv1Nleg-A0p9PwTsqVun3_Sa5a4hj2i4D2SsOcsjq2nyNn6IYDuAbUhRs2QQz4EsFnONvGtGq5aDJNUwOa9xg3vjXHBa8QuaXQjaMLsVq7Wjwm1uMknx_dwpQmkhtEP9vHVKsuczc6ageGsuSKewbT07pGyowZTzTg4oqJS_er120Puu91EVoGLwSo0aIgu24eKEAq_9szgcXuL17xbpv8QkPSbMx3k9nHOdy40o1xAGwwGTPPoAKBoVw3/3r3/hH_b5xecTmCWY7IJhooD-A/h0/dx1Sh81my7HGdVhyR9uuZU4dzfwhQwliHZ94ZQysqFI) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: My team and I have had a long week, but I wanted to email you with a short update. | | | | | It’s DLCC President Jessica Post here. My team and I have had a long week, but I’m coming to you with some great news! As of 10:00am today, State Democrats have: FLIPPED three chambers to Democratic control – the Minnesota Senate, Michigan House, and Michigan Senate – creating two new Democratic trifectas in critical states! Won must-hold Democratic legislatures in Colorado, Maine, Nevada and New Mexico – some of our top targets this year! Protected the veto power of two Democratic governors in key states – Wisconsin and North Carolina – giving them a critical tool to fight back against extreme Republican legislation. These victories were only possible thanks to you and this grassroots team. We were able to make targeted investments in campaigns, knock on over a million doors, and get organizers on the ground to turn out swing voters. And it worked – thanks to you we were able to defend and pick up key chambers that will protect the future of voting rights, abortion access, and more. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We bucked the conventional wisdom that says the president’s party can’t win in midterm elections. You made this possible – and I’m incredibly grateful for your support.** Thank you for all you’ve done and for all you’ll do. Best, Jessica Jessica Post, DLCC President | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. Peter,
**B R E A K I N G N E W S. **
**Our Senate Race in Georgia is going to a RUNOFF. **
**WE MUST WIN THIS RACE TO TAKE BACK OUR MAJORITY. EVERYTHING COMES DOWN TO THIS, Peter.**
The Democrats' MEGA donors will pour MILLIONS of dollars into Georgia because they know that's the ONLY way they can win. __You have been one of our STRONGEST patriots from the very beginning, and our country desperately needs you to step up ONE MORE TIME to help us TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY AND WIN THIS RACE.__

name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6306%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=xcUC4hmYSjayXdWd%2bpZ%2bRw&sysid=1)
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82713%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sUsvsJ099F7hA6lZ5gHyog&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82714%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZkOjALsZpoOoPnO9cjhDSw&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82725%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ub8hOk6cZZgviU7isrgZtg&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82726%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i10BSFXk0g9hro6nhMBJLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82727%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mLYvoicoang%2fQ8IhfLcmqg&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEGPgyAUhH8N3jTwBLUHD9s17anJJk17bZ6IlRTQWGzj_vpFd9vDJoTkfTMMMKpkWVZAVlDOoqbkgKyVkS6BAjDGgAkuRJoIAOQppZQXm7YWBeFUWdQmaUelfKfdTY1NmOdE9jbqyloJnlNoWb7JsEUuAUQt65oiSinyIjJl5_1wJ-kHgV1YS07T2yd62SWjejxCUMAWR-1U_MC4tyTdTd5e7v00SkXS6q0RyBbBqkZPwVUF6y-RaAfUV_diaPvJ-TCBeDl659WKnDTxgbfH_XGe1HeQL87oJgj_YKeb8OoqM9sdPm8uGstmeGpj9D3LQyvXtZWlhHC30e1cknxLANZjAOt_YfLpGU-nwzjHX47He3GG6yLCZ9j9PKi38y8kWcteaF79AGZ6iFo)

](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkMFvgyAYxf8avGngQ1APHtaZ7tA02aXdsaGAlRXQWGznfz906w5LCMn3e48HPF0TzkvgJc5JouocBGllYmrAAIQQICxnjGYMQOQUY5yXVXtmJcqxdsLYrB21Dp3xVz2qOM-Z7F3S1W2riopi2Z4xF7yszlIywouSViAoK0Ri6y6E4YboC4JtXEuO6t1DBNllo77fY1DETozG6_Qu0t4hup2CO936aZQa0eZPQ8AXwWllpuhqovWHSOEGYS7-yYTrJx_iBOzp6H3QK_LSpoePz_3OfcnjLsonb42Kwj_YGRVf3XC72YrH1SdjrYaHsdbceBFbuaytLCXEu61p5xoVGwSwHgNY_wtToEdxOOzHOX33efrGjnBZRHiNe5gH_ef8DcnWshdaNN_SJYfR)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**[FirstName,Fallback=Patriot], that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFvgyAUhX8NvmngCuoefGhn3NOSZUm77KlBvFZSQGOxjf9-6NY-LCEk9zuHAxwsWZYVkBWUs6gtOUjWqUiXQAEYY8AEFyJNBIDkKaWUFy9dIwrCKVqpTdJNiL7X7oJTG-YlUYON-hLzEIsNMuxyzmnaZFwC43mHuRKARWTK3vvxStIdgTqsNacd7F161ScT3m4hKGArJ-0wvsl4sCStZ29P12GeFJK0emoEslWw2Oo5uKpg_SVK2lHqs3swaYfZ-TCBeDgG53FDTpm4aorvT1HUu68gn5zRbRD-wV634dVVZva1vF9cNJXteNfG6GuWh1bOWytrCeFuo7ulJPmeAGzHALb_wuzTozwc3qcl_nA8fhNHOK8ivIbdLyM-nX8hyVb2SvPqB98bhkQ)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Friend, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

clean_body: Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | | | | | | Hi Friend, Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs. But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.) Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words. He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen. But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy. Zach has been held without bail this entire time. What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once. And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted! As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA! [FirstName,Fallback=Patriot], that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email. If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too. You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger. Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife: “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.” That’s why I ask you to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Friend, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th. We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

name: Nikki Haley
subject: why I’ve been traveling
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP5ZqEhQ5Ubi2y7HEOeSZDScE9Rks6lyyPEbEbSGiV3pglgFh5GuOWb-FfQppxNG6sL84NAlqF2f_HNEoIEfVgLr_Fwpnd8GqZg7wgdqsebWv-4nClO0UDjo-uKcFhqHsHnGJp-rAaBFyZChANcvafRfEH0jsO-_4ojyYNk8AIa0SANeKEexjIvhOpVEuqBjhlw%3D)
---
Friend,
---
I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. Growing up, we were the only Indian family in our small, rural southern town, population 2,500. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. We faced discrimination and hardship. But my parents never gave in to grievance and hate. My mom built a successful business. My dad taught 30 years at a historically black college. And that’s just the beginning. In 2004, I ran my first race for state legislature. I was the underdog. I was told I didn’t stand a chance. I defeated a 30-year incumbent, and I proved the doubters wrong and won reelection twice. In 2011, I was sworn in as the first female minority governor of South Carolina. I was, again, the underdog and went on to win reelection. I would go on to become U.S. ambassador to the UN and the first Indian-American to hold a cabinet level position. I’ve lived the American Dream, and I’m doing everything in my power to protect it. [**That’s why I’ve spent the past two years traveling across the country, advising, endorsing, and rallying behind more than 60 conservative candidates.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP5ZqEhQ5Ubi2y7HEOeSZDScE9Rks6lyyPEbEbSGiV3pgluA5dBeTkyOpc5y36DB8Itw2hrD9U3lLNMzcF9FEGmuBjs5sVTOuzb5D96cP99qB47fq-HbWin0X3NiTCdPLYc5aI1eQjcIsErwP-JqsZONcYVKh0ewrueVgB4v4-_aqMEPJKQcpAJ1mU0IWmcsttU%3D) In order to preserve the American Dream and uphold our nation’s founding values, we need to support freedom-loving Republicans across our nation. We need to end the Left’s agenda and rally behind leaders who will put forth conservative solutions. I traveled to Texas, Iowa, New Jersey, New York, Virginia, South Carolina, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Georgia, and more states to support Republican candidates, take down the Left’s agenda, and stand for America. But I didn’t do it alone. With your support, we had some historic victories in places that Democrats never thought we could flip. Democrats doubted that a Republican could win in TX-15 or VA-02. They thought they could hold onto their blue attorney general seat in Iowa that they’ve held for nearly 45 years. But we proved them wrong. [**Our work is far from over. We need to keep this movement going and continue fighting for our country, which is why I’m asking you for your support one more time.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP5ZqEhQ5Ubi2y7HEOeSZDScE9Rks6lyyPEbEbSGiV3pggzX0E0o72WFvA-QPL8icHMaKlE0IK3RkW87D2tvv9kt0Bra9vEY9NMHpPbq7h0HT3qw6W4nO_NSMrrUB6o2DLsES4yJdRrtiV5vbGhPsBwKhWS57EmpILVCZCCJdztzZgzIHfF2qXEmIyYyAP2puPc%3D) When I finished my time serving at the UN, I made a promise to never stop standing for America. It’s a promise I intend to keep. [**If you want to help me keep this promise, I’m asking you to pitch in a donation of $1, $35, $50, $100, or more today.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP5ZqEhQ5Ubi2y7HEOeSZDScE9Rks6lyyPEbEbSGiV3pgjrgLrAuEux62ElQgUHjzkF8nUbV5J935DnbcvfGA3w2KS9G6Qn6d-6oIg0IHpXfGhy3H39mtjiAscagqDmPwtlmZg3CwgrsRn-pAxLPZHXKEiveOkfH0-uFQW39o9jD2luogfgtXKe9Xt5VCiIwqcI%3D) Election Day may be over, but fighting for a stronger country is not. My very best,

---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP5ZqEhQ5Ubi2y7HEOeSZDScE9Rks6lyyPEbEbSGiV3pggLt6ZloIjGo1nHyj0tcGYDvDD-VF5Ij6FZ-1NW9aVPhC_taUSZrgde8izt3poRI5AK_KQqS5IyWl_pQUwvYC1yCkhCf2J0FgoVe58SF4c6Tc7NZTSd5BJnWd_pg4EnvMN7AQkIXJ8APvZ1qpr7baEw%3D)
---
Nikki Haley
---
[**Donate Now**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP5ZqEhQ5Ubi2y7HEOeSZDScE9Rks6lyyPEbEbSGiV3pgm8iRHa7HUkTnoh4rQadqpSle21kKIwwWhLknN5IgJcSPufIv9bMCcLfJryvvKIAMdgYEYvtQsJtSUgzkDRz32od47WG1aeBZu5h3nbM4P4ArSvaB8JDepMXQMK89N7hnFJy8AvYJ47u6eVPBZt8PJ0%3D)
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=a8b0e4e7a4ed4ed9a882941498b5e885&_e=_x2AeeIlQjR6tJKa3sUFcW9Ttt3ukKO7TKi47VafThfU5qeOD_ldIQQuT5h_eEJqpYTVpnF9Tgs4FzfWyMYU2K3JbQxWPPFgFchMAYxDXI_E8CTWrEOJeQPAx6Q5EChG6VGnA1iTRHiXPtgtlDEL2tHowtA8CQNk0rhHBdrGgP7JPC3R-Rs3oi9dZI_uVlxNKkcsrSYxYXC-4UVZbFIz5yCWstHaU6bMB7MIzSavdpseZcMyMeqBfp-ANyjxj5nPtXhgU7BrMECkcTsoOIQzklU9uwYo-bC8WRabqQ4Xcj9sEmYfhojP5m6E9UIfot3IQh0Egdhix83_-1IO0PObiL3FWk8eTbkjUw9N2k_6oec%3D)
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. Growing up, we were the only Indian family in our small, rural southern town, population 2,500. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. We faced discrimination and hardship. But my parents never gave in to grievance and hate. My mom built a successful business. My dad taught 30 years at a historically black college. And that’s just the beginning. In 2004, I ran my first race for state legislature. I was the underdog. I was told I didn’t stand a chance. I defeated a 30-year incumbent, and I proved the doubters wrong and won reelection twice. In 2011, I was sworn in as the first female minority governor of South Carolina. I was, again, the underdog and went on to win reelection. I would go on to become U.S. ambassador to the UN and the first Indian-American to hold a cabinet level position. I’ve lived the American Dream, and I’m doing everything in my power to protect it. In order to preserve the American Dream and uphold our nation’s founding values, we need to support freedom-loving Republicans across our nation. We need to end the Left’s agenda and rally behind leaders who will put forth conservative solutions. I traveled to Texas, Iowa, New Jersey, New York, Virginia, South Carolina, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Georgia, and more states to support Republican candidates, take down the Left’s agenda, and stand for America. But I didn’t do it alone. With your support, we had some historic victories in places that Democrats never thought we could flip. Democrats doubted that a Republican could win in TX-15 or VA-02. They thought they could hold onto their blue attorney general seat in Iowa that they’ve held for nearly 45 years. But we proved them wrong. When I finished my time serving at the UN, I made a promise to never stop standing for America. It’s a promise I intend to keep. Election Day may be over, but fighting for a stronger country is not. My very best, Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: If you want to preserve the American Dream and uphold our nation’s values, I need you on my team. I’ve spent the past two years traveling across the country, supporting more than 60 conservative candidates. Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851202:6K-aTLG8N:m:1:3369487795:86B25237B32E648284BB743FD858EF24:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851202:6K-aTLG8N:m:1:3369487795:86B25237B32E648284BB743FD858EF24:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851202:6K-aTLG8N:m:1:3369487795:86B25237B32E648284BB743FD858EF24:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

clean_body: I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. I need your help. | | Derek, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support.That's why I'm humbly asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the Democratic National Committee to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide? GOP donors are flooding our race with millions of dollars -- and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia’s Senate seat. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. I need your help. ** Thank you for all that you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. subject: I’m running low
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853557:J-zqTLGN_:m:1:3350876382:2747CDB9EAA65ED4DD58989B5038B805:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853557:J-zqTLGN_:m:1:3350876382:2747CDB9EAA65ED4DD58989B5038B805:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853557:J-zqTLGN_:m:1:3350876382:2747CDB9EAA65ED4DD58989B5038B805:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853557:J-zqTLGN_:m:1:3350876382:2747CDB9EAA65ED4DD58989B5038B805:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853557:J-zqTLGN_:m:1:3350876382:2747CDB9EAA65ED4DD58989B5038B805:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Progressives win big, election breakdown!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Progressives Outperform in Midterms! | Fetterman Flips Senate
Seat | Georgia Runoff | 7 New Allies in Congress | Keith Ellison’s Victory
| Megan Green Wins in St. Louis | AOC on NYPAN’s Leadership | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1011&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

Come celebrate our progressive wins from the midterm with US Rep. Ro
Khanna, talk about what is next during the lame duck session with
Greenpeace USA Co-Director Ebony Martin, and hear from other special
guests on our LIVE National Organizing Call this Monday at 8:30 pm ET/5:30
PT.

We’ll also strategize around the Georgia runoff, our Black Friday actions
to Make Amazon Pay, and stopping the Dirty Deal again! You won’t want to
miss this.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1013&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

Thank you to everyone who made calls, volunteered, and donated to Our
Revolution’s massive GOTV effort in this pivotal midterm election!

With your help, we beat back the far right, flipped a Senate seat, elected
7 new allies to Congress, and expanded progressive power up and down the
ballot.

Your donations and volunteerism powered our work on the ground and online
— turning out progressives, young voters, and working-class folks, who
were the margin of victory in top races with tight margins around the
country.

Our organizers and volunteers made more than 4 million voter contacts — 2
million calls and texts! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1014&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]Through collective action, we are lifting the
progressive movement into power.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1015&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

We proved in this election that progressive policy and organizing are a
roadmap for victory.

“Our populist economic message powered John Fetterman to victory in a
critical battleground state and elected the largest progressive voting
bloc in Congress while preventing a red wave,” said Our Revolution
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese.

Progressive candidates won nearly every race they ran in with campaigns
focused on the fight for justice, reproductive rights, and improving the
standard of living of their constituents.

“Bread and butter issues resonated with voters who want a government that
puts the needs of working people ahead of the rich and powerful,” Joseph
said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1016&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

With progressives growing their margins in Congress, Democrats should take
note of the powerfully fought and won campaigns, driven by progressive
ideals, that galvanized voters.

“This sends a clear message and roadmap that going into 2024 Democrats
must lean into the popularity of the progressive platform, not write it
off,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8011?t=1017&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]The Guardian.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1018&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to keep growing our
movement and our impact between elections — we have a lot of work to do
before 2024!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1019&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

FETTERMAN FLIPS SENATE SEAT

Dr. Oz is headed back to New Jersey after the right-wing spent $100
million trying to defeat John Fetterman — and lost!

Our Revolution volunteers made over 260,000 voter contacts in PA and
helped Fetterman outperform President Biden in every county — flipping
some red counties blue.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1020&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

“I’m proud of what we ran on,” Fetterman said in his victory speech
Tuesday night. “Protecting a woman’s right to choose, raising our minimum
wage, fighting for the union way of life, healthcare as a human right,
standing up to corporate greed, making more things here in America,
standing up for our democracy...”

He dedicated this win to every person who has felt left behind and
everyone who has been knocked down and had to get back up.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1021&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

Celebrate this BIG WIN in PA by getting your Fetterman sticker in his
iconic shorts and hoodie — while supplies last!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7676?t=1022&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]GET YOUR STICKER NOW!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1023&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

GEARING UP FOR GEORGIA RUNOFF

Now, we must focus our work in Georgia, where a runoff election between
Sen. Raphael Warnock and Trump’s handpicked candidate Herschel Walker will
determine the fate of the Senate.

From now to December 6th, we must outwork and out-organize the coming
surge of money and Republican propaganda.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1024&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

In 2020, our targeted voter outreach boosted turnout by 11% to help
Senator Warnock win his first Georgia runoff — and we need a repeat
performance.

Can we count on you to help us cut through the attack ads, make personal
connections with voters, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1025&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]DONATE TO OUR EMERGENCY GEORGIA FUND

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1026&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

That’s right — we elected 7 new allies to the House on Tuesday — vastly
growing the power of our progressive voting bloc in Congress!

Organizing overpowered big money to clinch wins for Greg Casar (TX-35),
Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Maxwell Frost (FL-10), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine
Crockett (TX-30), Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), Becca Balint (VT).

“Progressives had a good night,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8013?t=1027&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]Slate wrote. “Despite major efforts
by various outside spending groups to move the Democratic Party to the
right during the primaries, the leftward push continues.”

“We’ll have a historic number of progressives, true progressives, in
Congress,” Our Revolution member and US Rep-elect Greg Casar told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7983?t=1028&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]In
These Times.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1029&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]Become a recurring donor to Our Revolution to support our work as we
partner with new allies in Congress to fight for our progressive policies!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1030&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

ELLISON VICTORY IN MINNESOTA

Minnesota AG Keith Ellison proved you can take on corporate criminals,
prosecute the police officer who murdered George Floyd and win
re-election!

Keith Ellison defended his progressive mantle after attacks from all
sides, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8014?t=1031&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]The Intercept reported. When you stand up to the powerful, you
get powerful enemies — but with the help of Our Revolution volunteers who
made over 100,000 personal calls to MN voters, Keith held his seat by a
20,000-vote margin!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1032&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

“Thanks to Our Revolution, we are going to continue our work to make sure
folks can afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect —
every day,” Keith said.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1033&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]As a board member of Our Revolution, Keith Ellison knows our
inside-outside strategy for change will work. Sign up as a member today to
keep building progressive momentum!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1034&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

MAJOR WIN IN ST. LOUIS

Our Revolution-backed Megan Green won her grassroots campaign for
President of the St. Louis Board of Alderman against a wave of money from
big developers in the city.

Megan joins a growing bloc of progressive power in St. Louis that includes
Mayor Tishaura O. Jones and US Rep. Cori Bush, who was also re-elected on
Tuesday!

“An unapologetic progressive wins in the heartland, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8015?t=1035&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]STL Today wrote.
“Her victory puts an exclamation point on the rise of progressive
Democrats in the city.”

On the board, Megan helped pass a $15 min wage and she’ll be a strong
advocate for housing justice, good union jobs, strong neighborhoods, and
more as Board President.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1036&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

NYPAN & AOC ON NY POLITICS

Our Revolution: NY Progressive Action Network worked in solidarity with
Working Families Party NY to hold the line for narrow wins for Democrats.

While progressive organizers and trade union supporters worked tirelessly
to campaign across the state, NYPAN’s Executive Committee reported that
“the Democratic Party establishment itself was nowhere to be seen” and
their ad messaging “neglected the suffering of New Yorkers.”

US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8016?t=1037&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ]The Intercept that in the
absence of state party leadership, organizations like Our Revolution-NYPAN
are rising up to lead.

“NYPAN’s organizing is very ripe to fill the role that the state
Democratic Party has left vacant,” AOC said. “An offshoot of the Our
Revolution chapters that cropped up all across New York state, NYPAN
retained their infrastructure and they are active across the state.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1038&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

PROGRESS THROUGH BALLOT MEASURES

In some states, abortion rights were literally on the ballot. And, in each
of the 5 states — MI, CA, KY, MT, and VT — the pro-choice position won!

Economic justice was also on the ballot. Supported by Our Revolution DC
and One Fair Wage, Initiative 82 passed 3:1 to end the sub-minimum wage
for tipped workers!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1039&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

In Illinois, Amendment 1 created a state constitutional right to
collective bargaining, and both Nevada and Nebraska voted to raise the
minimum wage.

And, folks in Maryland voted on ballot measures to legalize marijuana —
Missouri did the same and will expunge records for nonviolent
marijuana-related offenses.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1040&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1041&akid=3727%2E5885482%2E6rcEM_ ][IMG]

clean_body: Don’t buy the hype. Nothing is settled yet. | | | Friend, this is Darin LaHood, a conservative congressman out of IL-16. The left wants YOU to think the election is done and settled. But it’s far from over. If you haven't heard yet, the Georgia Senate race between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is going to a runoff election on December 6th! | | Friend, make no mistake – this election will decide control of Congress, restoring our America First agenda, and ultimately the fate of our country. That’s why I’m stepping to help elect Herschel Walker by fundraising and splitting donations to help his Get Out the Vote efforts for December 6th. Thank you,Darin LaHood P.S. Friend, thanks to grassroots folks like you, we just forced our must-win Senate race into a runoff election.
But with the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking: [Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Jacky Rosen to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54524446/378791534/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2225-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTM2NDYzNi1kMTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQFsgF0Q5s-lP6JT_roGTSvURVaVsPTFEdwKAicSHhU=)**

name: Dan, Liz, Emily & the entire Team Benson Campaign
subject: We’re so happy Jocelyn won!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=111122 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=111122] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friend,
What a week! What a campaign! What a candidate!
That’s right, now that we’ve had a few days to let reality sink-in we are proud of the part we played in getting Jocelyn re-elected Michigan secretary of state. The notion that she was the top vote getter on Tuesday was icing on the cake.
When we started this campaign, we knew that victory depended on uniting a broad coalition of pro-democracy supporters. Now that the votes have been counted, it’s clear that we accomplished our goal because of you, and so many other great Team Benson supporters.
Whether you made a contribution, stuck a sign in your lawn, attended a rally or motivated everyone you knew to vote on this crucial election, FNAME, your hard work helped win this election for Jocelyn. Your hard work helped democracy win at the ballot box.
Of course, the fight for democracy is not over. We know the election deniers and conspiracy theorists are not going away and so we must remain vigilant..
But Tuesday’s results speak for themselves. Our community is large and it is growing. And it will always show up at the ballot box to defend democracy.
Thank you again, friend. We’re all so thankful for your continued support.
As Jocelyn always says,
Onward!
-Dan, Liz, Emily & the entire Team Benson Campaign
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: Team Moore-Miller
subject: WATCH: Highlights from our winning campaign
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54502043/378762914/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221112highlights_tmm_od30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjUwZmViYy1hYTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqfKi1gPchXy__CSV5einvJ6NorqzqQ2jAZ32-Hdqmo=)
---
Team, Thanks to you, Wes Moore is now Maryland’s Governor-Elect. On Tuesday, we made history by electing Wes the first Black Governor of Maryland (and only the third Black governor in the United States since Reconstruction) and electing Aruna the first immigrant and first woman of color Lieutenant Governor of Maryland! Plus, their administration will include Anthony Brown, the first Black Attorney General of Maryland, and Brooke Lierman, Maryland’s first woman Comptroller! Wes and Aruna didn’t get into this race to make history: they did it to bring Marylanders from all walks of life together to make transformative change. They know they were not the first ones to try — this is just more proof that progress is possible, and that Maryland is leading the way. **The history that matters most to us is the history that we—and the people of this state—are going to make over the next four years.** The journey of this campaign is one that many saw as improbable. We started out polling at just one percent in the most competitive gubernatorial primary in the country, but this team believed and worked hard, and together, we assembled the best campaign this state has ever seen! What we built together is not just a moment — _it is a movement._ **[Watch our campaign highlight reel here to see how far we’ve come together, then pitch in to keep the MOOREmentum going as Wes and Aruna prepare to lead Maryland forward →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54502044/378762915/638324267?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221112highlights_tmm_od30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjUwZmViYy1hYTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqfKi1gPchXy__CSV5einvJ6NorqzqQ2jAZ32-Hdqmo=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54502045/378762916/638324267?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221112highlights_tmm_od30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjUwZmViYy1hYTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqfKi1gPchXy__CSV5einvJ6NorqzqQ2jAZ32-Hdqmo=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54502046/378762917/638324267?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221112highlights_tmm_od30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjUwZmViYy1hYTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqfKi1gPchXy__CSV5einvJ6NorqzqQ2jAZ32-Hdqmo=)
---
Thank you again for everything you’ve done to get us here. We can’t wait for what comes next.
— Team Moore-Miller

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland.

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

clean_body: | = Team, Thanks to you, Wes Moore is now Maryland’s Governor-Elect. On Tuesday, we made history by electing Wes the first Black Governor of Maryland (and only the third Black governor in the United States since Reconstruction) and electing Aruna the first immigrant and first woman of color Lieutenant Governor of Maryland! Plus, their administration will include Anthony Brown, the first Black Attorney General of Maryland, and Brooke Lierman, Maryland’s first woman Comptroller! Wes and Aruna didn’t get into this race to make history: they did it to bring Marylanders from all walks of life together to make transformative change. They know they were not the first ones to try — this is just more proof that progress is possible, and that Maryland is leading the way. The history that matters most to us is the history that we—and the people of this state—are going to make over the next four years. The journey of this campaign is one that many saw as improbable. We started out polling at just one percent in the most competitive gubernatorial primary in the country, but this team believed and worked hard, and together, we assembled the best campaign this state has ever seen! What we built together is not just a moment — it is a movement. = = | = Thank you again for everything you’ve done to get us here. We can’t wait for what comes next. — Team Moore-Miller | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: “The Curse of the Red Vest” tells the story of a Governor who failed to deliver. | = Derek, You may remember reading a headline or two over the past year about Glenn Youngkin’s travel-packed schedule as he crisscrossed the country, deserting his post as Governor to try to surf the “red wave.” But on Tuesday, we saw more of a “red ripple,” not a wave. And, as the Washington Post notes, of the 15 states where Youngkin traveled to stump for GOP candidates, only four saw clear Republican victories. Now that Glenn Youngkin’s attention is no longer spent on traveling to support GOP candidates, it’s up to us here in Virginia to make sure he isn’t able to strip Virginians of their right to reproductive freedom, scale back climate change prevention measures, and reverse the progress we’ve made here in the Commonwealth. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** With your help, Democrats across Virginia will stop Glenn Youngkin’s 2023 legislative agenda in its tracks. = VADEMS =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850096:JzjwkLGLN:m:1:3372944669:55C05E1F45B61D57423D933462EDD7F2:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850097:JzjwkLGLN:m:1:3372944669:55C05E1F45B61D57423D933462EDD7F2:r)

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850096:JzjwkLGLN:m:1:3372944669:55C05E1F45B61D57423D933462EDD7F2:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850096:JzjwkLGLN:m:1:3372944669:55C05E1F45B61D57423D933462EDD7F2:r)**

Thank you,

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853575:6IkxkLGjN:m:1:3359512271:017A0F762772AED2AC3ED9AD17BE3988:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853575:6IkxkLGjN:m:1:3359512271:017A0F762772AED2AC3ED9AD17BE3988:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853575:6IkxkLGjN:m:1:3359512271:017A0F762772AED2AC3ED9AD17BE3988:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61853575:6IkxkLGjN:m:1:3359512271:017A0F762772AED2AC3ED9AD17BE3988:r)

clean_body: | Peter - brace yourself. This Georgia Senate race is far from over. Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. However, my campaign is running on empty. The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP. This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: coffee and Georgia…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me.
| | | I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me.

It's the morning after the Georgia Senate runoff. You rub the sleep out of your eyes. Brew some coffee. Look at the news to find out what happened in that race -- the one that was going to determine the balance of power in the Senate. **[The one where you chipped in an extra $5 to help push our candidate over the finish line.](https://go.dscc.org/go/10985?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221112-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221112-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8631%2E9716520%2EIp5HzT)**

And wouldn't you know, the headlines are fantastic. We did it! Sen. Warnock won! We defended our Senate majority. Your coffee has never tasted so great.

**But there's another way it could happen.** Morning. Coffee. News. But in this scenario, you didn't pitch in that $5. You were feeling pretty good about our chances, after all. The headlines jump out at you: "Democrats lose in Georgia. Herschel Walker unseats Raphael Warnock." Your coffee has never tasted so bitter.

You still have time to choose between these two outcomes -- but not much. We're running out of time to invest the resources that will mobilize voters -- so don't wait for tomorrow. Don't even read the rest of this email. [**Click here to chip in $5 right now -- and to sweeten the deal, the next 100 gifts will be QUADRUPLED!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10985?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221112-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221112-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8631%2E9716520%2EIp5HzT)

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first 100 gifts received from this email will be QUADRUPLED:

We've all seen the polls. Georgia is statistically tied. In races this close, _every little thing_ makes a huge difference. Every door knocked. Every call made. **And yes, every dollar given.**

But with the runoff just weeks away, we can't afford to wait. Your donation won't be going toward some far off future program. **It will be put to use first thing tomorrow.**
