clean_body: I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me. | | | I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me. It's the morning after the Georgia Senate runoff. You rub the sleep out of your eyes. Brew some coffee. Look at the news to find out what happened in that race -- the one that was going to determine the balance of power in the Senate. And wouldn't you know, the headlines are fantastic. We did it! Sen. Warnock won! We defended our Senate majority. Your coffee has never tasted so great. But there's another way it could happen. Morning. Coffee. News. But in this scenario, you didn't pitch in that $5. You were feeling pretty good about our chances, after all. The headlines jump out at you: "Democrats lose in Georgia. Herschel Walker unseats Raphael Warnock." Your coffee has never tasted so bitter. You still have time to choose between these two outcomes -- but not much. We're running out of time to invest the resources that will mobilize voters -- so don't wait for tomorrow. Don't even read the rest of this email. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first 100 gifts received from this email will be QUADRUPLED: | | | | | We've all seen the polls. Georgia is statistically tied. In races this close, every little thing makes a huge difference. Every door knocked. Every call made. And yes, every dollar given. But with the runoff just weeks away, we can't afford to wait. Your donation won't be going toward some far off future program. It will be put to use first thing tomorrow. Thanks, Chuck P.S. Want a great coffee tip to stay warm as fall turns to winter? Add a dash of cardamom. Want another one? Nothing will chill our bones more than Mitch McConnell picking up a Senate seat, so pitch in now: | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. _**That 's why I need YOUR help to fight back.**_ If we don't win this race, there is ZERO CHANCE that we retake the Senate.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'd like to tell you a story about my mom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend – I'd like to tell you a story about someone who's very special to me: my mom, Verlene Warnock. As a teenager growing up in Waycro
| | |
---
Friend – I'd like to tell you a story about someone who's very special to me: my mom, Verlene Warnock.

As a teenager growing up in Waycross, Georgia, in the 1950s, my mom used to pick somebody else's cotton. She raised 12 boys and girls in public housing on the west side of Savannah – and although money was short, Mom's love was always long. She told us we could do anything we put our minds to.

**J****ust last year, Mom used her 84-year-old hands that used to pick somebody else's cotton to pick her son to be a United States senator from Georgia, the first Black senator in our state's history. God bless you, Mom.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54503737/378770164/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5062-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMThkNDQ2Mi1iMDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aU2SmSSRGbgVZZfzBeaA6Qn2Hu0iVivuTbcc8SmzcoA=)
But my last race was just the beginning, friend. Right now, experts are saying this race will be incredibly close, and GOP super PACs are launching ads to flip my seat and turn Georgia red.

**The only way I can fight back against GOP attacks, protect my Senate seat, and win our critical fights for justice is with your help. That's why I'm personally asking:**[**Will you donate $5 or more now to win in Georgia? A grassroots contribution from you – right here, right now – will make what Mom and I never could have dreamed of a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54503738/378770165/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5062-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMThkNDQ2Mi1iMDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aU2SmSSRGbgVZZfzBeaA6Qn2Hu0iVivuTbcc8SmzcoA=)
My mom is so proud of what this team has accomplished, friend. So am I. Let's keep Georgia blue – together.
– Sen. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54503739/378770166/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5062-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMThkNDQ2Mi1iMDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aU2SmSSRGbgVZZfzBeaA6Qn2Hu0iVivuTbcc8SmzcoA=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Deters?=
subject: It's time for Mitch's reckoning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Deters for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=59ea55f7f5&e=fdefed58de)
Peter, the midterms are now over and we have much to discuss about the results.Was there a massive red wave? No, not really.Was there a great amount of Republican victory? Yes, yes there was.But, the part that we really need to discuss is that the counting of these votes in swing states is a joke. As I write this email to you guys, we still have states counting votes.We still don’t know the election results from Nevada, Arizona or even key races in Colorado.It’s a joke, to be frank. Our nation is the richest on earth but our elections are run like a third-world sham country.That’s one of the many reasons I’m running for Governor - many thought my race was this week, but our race is actually in 2023. We’re still fighting hard to win our primary and that’s why I’m writing to you today.
| [HELP ERIC WIN BACK THE KENTUCKY GOVERNORSHIP!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5df5b572d5&e=fdefed58de)
---
It might shock you if you’re not from Kentucky, but our red state has a Democrat governor.Why is that? Our GOP is controlled by Mitch McConnell and keeps running McConnell acolytes to try and oust him.Even though we all know that, people keep telling me that if I want to win I have to kiss Mitch McConnel’s ring.Personally, I think Mitch McConnell needs to retire from politics and stay out of our business.If that isn’t how politics works, tough. I’m not here to fake.They say I won't be able to get the funding to win the primary or general without Mitch McConnell... I call bullshit.The American people are sick and tired of the political establishment, and with this race being a chance to stick it to him and show him his influence isn’t everything, I know I’ll have their support!So, today, now that the midterms are basically over, we’re the team to support if you want to see some more conservative victories.My primary is coming up in a few months, but I have to raise the money now to be able to win it - and as I told you, I don’t plan on kissing up to the establishment to do it.**So, if you want a constitutional conservative outsider to beat the RINO establishment and be the Ron DeSantis of Kentucky, I need you to send me your most generous donation today!**
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $25.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7e3896948c&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $50.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1937c26d30&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $100.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=08ca24204b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $1,000.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=977f1a7a46&e=fdefed58de)
---
A strong Governor can make a difference not just in their state - but in the entire nation. Just look at how Ron DeSantis has inspired the nation through his work in Florida. I aim to fight as hard as Ron DeSantis. I am another candidate in the mold of Kari Lake and others, and I’ll govern as a Constitutional Conservative.We will set an example for the country so people can see what TRUE liberty looks like.
You know that we can’t let Mitch get his way. He is desperate to keep me out of the Governor’s office because he knows I would stand up to weak-kneed RINOs who have sold out Kentucky and this country.Sincerely,Eric Deters
|
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54504087/378771173/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVjYjQ3NC1iMzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kGjU4yDRzkNTcVKECiuySrMrQk0QGynkBvGwgxSX2k=&emci=309cba39-3662-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=fc5cb474-b362-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **_[Will you split $25 between me and the Democratic Party of Party right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54504088/378771174/1583625711?refcode=20221112.3_RW_A28&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVjYjQ3NC1iMzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kGjU4yDRzkNTcVKECiuySrMrQk0QGynkBvGwgxSX2k=)_**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: **_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54504089/378771175/1583625711?refcode=20221112.3_RW_A28&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVjYjQ3NC1iMzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kGjU4yDRzkNTcVKECiuySrMrQk0QGynkBvGwgxSX2k=)_**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.
| | |
---
This can't wait, Peter: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
[**If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Letitia James so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54524989/378794547/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk912-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2MwZDRjOC1kZDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JS8UcWbufA6V_SKdFt7wr-h3sjd69cChQIfn9BWTw2M=)
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.

**We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**

I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, Peter:

clean_body: his race WILL DECIDE THE MAJORITY! | Peter, We won in Ohio, but our job’s not finished. All eyes are on Georgia right now for the run-off between Herschel Walker and his socialist opponent Raphael Warnock. If you care about a conservative Senate Majority and ensuring that we’re able to put America First again, I need you to step up RIGHT NOW and rush whatever you’re able below to help Herschel Walker defeat radical Socialist Raphael Warnock. If Warnock wins, he will continue to push a Leftist agenda that will make Georgia as blue as California if we allow him to win Georgia. | This is an all-out alert. Herschel Walker needs your immediate support to SAVE GEORGIA. God Bless, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. clean_body: we still have more work to do | | Derek - We are riding high out of our historic night on Tuesday and we’re waiting for the last votes to be counted. We can’t believe some of the numbers coming out of the exit polls. The numbers for the Youth Vote are staggering. But don't take our word for it. Look at these headlines: | | | | We said we do it and we did it. We stopped the Red Wave and young people delivered results for Democrats. We are so energized by these numbers, but we aren't done yet. We're turning our sights to Georgia. The Georgia run off is set for December 6 and we need your help to continue to motivate young people to vote in the Peach State. We have been here before. We were here in 2020 and we know what we have to do. We shocked the nation once. We're going to do it again. \- YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . subject: One more chance

body:

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850104:JTBwLLGNd:m:1:3373497171:77B63B755D71791429C95A14D1F82E39:r) **

clean_body: | Peter, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **An America United released a new [video](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=66298242e9ce4fd5afa7196f027fe1e4&_e=UpTcEd7rY4k4bhCDRPstyHvUL3bgE55RnA5_ioqb5vfbMXioR3bAQttVa-JqKkpRr1C0ghwKyb7jz8HuB3utRq_RcqlTvGmSv1JBnf5Mfeq3-Rr7i7f6yphYCVyBoo_D_8uLQOcQ-3tcXwH8ukXd53tOmNsu7F_IdU7RIopb5-5bTAMY6_lUzghgdqFTrrkhBkY5Tgfw3anmhxCpuBU69FXyHN3YSDyC-umhQUMna3iKf9YLMZ_uKKH5ZeAcLKhkvu7zF3g6ABeSWDMpG4l1bL7Aan7ZRdgP_yq38lDlj3OKPV9mgdCqLYuqvrl-GQXANuXLblWcUp7yn6TNMgmnHFCa5_sL4SnZUjFgtlPq3OX5iTT_6hC6QQueN3p36AvbZKpcsUhdqPhkHQQuMUoseW8lypMgl21uhQNZ4cYuhd6FtSWUOx_OZpEskYcvnedTenEsBIZfoVkNuWlSWjnSv1iHwgWDAYNw-alrESn_NG-GmJrrQ1WXB6HtFRWHNY2OE2vlu0YDQFXL44FTyOufzkDUAMuTcXwAKIASKXHkV__CjeN8L8oi2TQ198sWnbtGsdygQ1zBaLqRns89DkBqtanmqdAUVm2kzUTPh5tl780%3D) highlighting why the “Exhausted Majority” are fed up with the President’s leadership. An America United geofenced the digital ad to target President Biden’s rally.** **“After two years of failed policies, the exhausted majority of Americans aren’t buying Joe Biden’s campaign rhetoric and are demanding change. While the President is in our state, we hope he gets the opportunity to hear from Marylanders about how Governor Hogan has already shown a better path forward by turning the economy around, bringing people together, and leading with common sense,” said David Weinman, executive director of An America United.** **After the election, Governor Hogan spoke with CBS News in a phone Interview: "For years, Hogan said, 'I felt like I was on a lifeboat all by myself' inside the GOP, 'with everybody on the Trump Titanic' and with few allies for his conservative but Trump-skeptical approach. 'Now we need a bigger boat,' he said, as fellow Republicans arrive at a political crossroads and consider the party's future."**

clean_body: | | | | | On November 30th, An America United is putting togetherThe 2022 Governor's Celebration — a huge event for us to all get together and celebrate Governor Hogan's accomplishments over the last eight years. Having you there is very important to Governor Hogan and the team here at An America United. There will be live music, drinks, and tons of fun. The Governor's Celebration will be at Maryland Live! Casino on November 30th, 2022. Below is the formal invitation with more details for the event. "Exhausted Majority" An America United released a new highlighting why the “Exhausted Majority” are fed up with the President’s leadership. An America United geofenced the digital ad to target President Biden’s rally. “After two years of failed policies, the exhausted majority of Americans aren’t buying Joe Biden’s campaign rhetoric and are demanding change. While the President is in our state, we hope he gets the opportunity to hear from Marylanders about how Governor Hogan has already shown a better path forward by turning the economy around, bringing people together, and leading with common sense,” said David Weinman, executive director of An America United. After the election, Governor Hogan spoke with CBS News in a phone Interview: "For years, Hogan said, 'I felt like I was on a lifeboat all by myself' inside the GOP, 'with everybody on the Trump Titanic' and with few allies for his conservative but Trump-skeptical approach. 'Now we need a bigger boat,' he said, as fellow Republicans arrive at a political crossroads and consider the party's future." | | AN UPDATE FROM TWITTER | | | With the failures of the Democrats in Washington, this should have been a huge red wave. Excuses, lies, and toxic politics will not win elections or restore America. Only real leadership will do that. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | Eight years ago today, I was humbled to be elected to serve as governor of Maryland. Since then, there has not been a single day—good or bad—when I was not grateful for the privilege. — Governor Larry Hogan (@GovLarryHogan) | | | On this Veterans Day, I ask all Marylanders to pause and recognize the contributions and sacrifices of our veterans and their families and resolve to show our appreciation not just on this day, but every day. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

Fellow American,

**I didn't get in this Senate race to lose.**

Even after being outspent $101 million to $32 million in the general election, we still almost beat an incumbent senator in a battleground state. But since no candidate received a majority of the vote on Tuesday, we now will have a runoff election in 24 days.

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

| | | Dear Peter --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61855926:6ZBFLLGJN:m:1:3253819041:B12AD20A71259F9CB316B6D92C080494:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61855926:6ZBFLLGJN:m:1:3253819041:B12AD20A71259F9CB316B6D92C080494:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61855926:6ZBFLLGJN:m:1:3253819041:B12AD20A71259F9CB316B6D92C080494:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61855926:6ZBFLLGJN:m:1:3253819041:B12AD20A71259F9CB316B6D92C080494:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61855926:6ZBFLLGJN:m:1:3253819041:B12AD20A71259F9CB316B6D92C080494:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61855926:6ZBFLLGJN:m:1:3253819041:B12AD20A71259F9CB316B6D92C080494:r)

Lauren Boebert

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

---
| | | Dear Peter --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>")
---

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856008:6CRfrLGN2:m:1:3317145305:C9242BE5A73F9325415F22A64A8F8BB8:r)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

subject: I know we can win this.

body:
I'm feeling fired up
| | |
---
Friend, I'm feeling fired up. We've once again forced Georgia's Senate race into a runoff election – and I know we're going to win. Afterall, we’ve done it before.
**But to do that, I need your help more than ever. We nearly spent down to our last dollar to make it this far – which means we need to raise another $51,040 by midnight to fight back against GOP attacks, keep our TV ads live, and mobilize voters across the state.**
Donald Trump's allies have already flooded this race with more than $52 million to help Herschel Walker defeat me. So without an immediate surge in grassroots support, I'm worried we could put this seat in serious jeopardy.
**[Please, friend, can I count on you to rush $5 or more right now to fuel our people-powered movement to victory? I can't keep Georgia blue without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54512978/378781968/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5159-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDg1OGMxZi1jMTYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FaVXkkRIPu3S_uL4ITlYtbhZGcLB_dcZAHrryMbs4OY=)**

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850056:JXTTALGvN:m:1:3374012347:E68103359AE8F7F23374FE3C2BBE1579:r) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850056:JXTTALGvN:m:1:3374012347:E68103359AE8F7F23374FE3C2BBE1579:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61850056:JXTTALGvN:m:1:3374012347:E68103359AE8F7F23374FE3C2BBE1579:r)**

Thank you,

clean_body: | Peter, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Arizona is still counting votes for the governor’s race between Katie Hobbs and Donald Trump’s pet MAGA candidate, Kari Lake. Your help now can ensure a fair count for voters.
body:
We still don’t know who’s going to be the next governor of Arizona
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b68d75f-763e-4171-bb62-2b636b858b4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We must make sure every vote is counted in Arizona, so Democrat Katie Hobbs becomes Governor, and one of the worst democracy-haters--Kari Lake--never gets that job.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefe92b1c-cf35-48e0-b890-0114be57e0c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_If Hobbs wins--and right now she is up by 27,000 votes, but there are 300,000-400,000 votes left to count--we'll elect a Democratic Governor in Arizona for the first time in over a dozen years, a HUGE pickup. As Secretary of State, Hobbs refused to bow to Donald Trump's pressure campaign in 2020. We can feel good about a fair election in 2024 with Hobbs in the Governor's mansion._** **_Meanwhile, we must understand Lake respects neither our laws nor our Constitution. With her lies about voting, she's put Maricopa County election workers in danger--they've received regular death threats Lake threatened to shut down the media in Arizona if she wins and hasn't promised to accept the election results. She's told us she'll do the same in 2024 as Governor, meaning she'll cheat for Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis or whomever the GOP nominates for President._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Count Every Arizona Vote**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ee09fae-3cea-4eee-b2c8-6c4d68eeee93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Kari Lake, in my estimation, is one of the most dangerous politicians in America, because of her willingness to do anything to win and television skills she developed, ironically, as a tv news anchor over two decades. _** [**The vote counting is going on as we send this. THE TIME IS NOW. Would you join Blue Amp Action in rushing the necessary resources--be it $5, $10, $25 or more--to Katie Hobbs to ensure she has the necessary lawyers and staff so they count every vote and Kari Lake can't cheat her way to victory?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a0e89ad-e7ff-429c-b0a6-c25ab7fca3c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks, as always, my friends.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Count Every Arizona Vote**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c5439a4-5752-4d91-a4ff-459e543d7816/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851233:JG41ALGN_:m:1:3372944669:B1E134462309546F251FBC88A9F0B945:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851233:JG41ALGN_:m:1:3372944669:B1E134462309546F251FBC88A9F0B945:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851233:JG41ALGN_:m:1:3372944669:B1E134462309546F251FBC88A9F0B945:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

subject: All votes need to be counted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
We're gearing up for a big recount fight in AZ-06, and we need to make sure we have the resources to fight Republican vote suppression. Will you help us by rushing a donation now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-recount?refcode=X_111222_Waiting]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-recount?refcode=X_111222_Waiting [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-recount?refcode=X_111222_Waiting]
Votes are still being counted in Arizona. Kirsten and her opponent are in a dead heat, and it's looking like it's going to stay that way.
That means we're likely headed to a recount.
Republicans are going to put everything they have into making sure Juan Ciscomani wins. It's up to us to fight off their vote suppression.
Friend, we can only do that if we get a big infusion of donations in the next 24 hours. This seat is too important to risk — will you chip in a little now to help us get every vote counted? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-recount?refcode=X_111222_Waiting]

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Before anything else, thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they’re about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
Derek, I just want to say _thank you._
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we’ve come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we’ve shown the country that our fight for progress isn’t over.
**We know we can win this — we have done it before! But I’ve always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far — which means we’re now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That’s why I’m asking directly: **[Will you split $10 between me and Adam Schiff right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.xHzBB4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.Pekub1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.yqvkFX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.lSmETc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.kanJGq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.KIdsjB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)
---
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn’t be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything it's got since the beginning, and they haven’t let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they’re about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That’s why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We’re in a position to win this race — but not without grassroots support. And Adam Schiff suggested reaching out to you directly.**
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we’re falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I’m personally asking:[Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Adam Schiff to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=12&akid=1349%2E5257348%2EGzsSDO)**
Thank you for your support.
— Rev. Raphael Warnock
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
We accomplished so much | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/99769305512a/i-am-running-for-congress-9207834?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi there,

Now that it is said and done, I want to be sure to thank you all. I also want to thank every voter who cast a ballot and participated in their democracy on Tuesday. We may have fallen short, but I wouldn’t trade this experience for anything.

**What was clear on the campaign trail is that American politics is broken and people are hungry for new options.** I congratulate Congressman Fitzgerald, and hope he will heed that call and renounce the extreme partisan politics that have characterized his service to date.
---
|
---
| I want to be sure to thank my amazing wife, Renee, and our two girls, as well as the rest of our family and friends. You make me so proud and I hope I made you proud in this race as well. Thanks also to Calvin and the entire team for your efforts.

American democracy is not a given. A strong middle class is not a given. Our civil rights are not a given. Our planet is not a given. We must fight to protect and defend our values, and I’ll continue to do so.

I am so proud to have experienced this journey with all of you. Thank you.

Mike Van Someren
---

The GOP is coming after Rev. Warnock as its top target for defeat. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are throwing their full weight behind Walker – and national Republicans are pouring over $37 MILLION into his campaign to turn Georgia red.

clean_body: If you want to save America, I need your help. | Peter, Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line. Our country's future is on the line. AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN. Peter, you and I both know our country is on the wrong track. But if Senator Warnock is re-elected and Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we will get more of the same: more inflation, more crime, more open borders, more woke policies, and more support for the disastrous Biden agenda. I'm fired up for this runoff election and ready to get America back on track, but I can't do it alone. I need your help. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851238:J4vP1LGN8:m:1:3373497171:E9E2E98937CDCF116C442482CF60BCF4:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851238:J4vP1LGN8:m:1:3373497171:E9E2E98937CDCF116C442482CF60BCF4:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851238:J4vP1LGN8:m:1:3373497171:E9E2E98937CDCF116C442482CF60BCF4:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851238:J4vP1LGN8:m:1:3373497171:E9E2E98937CDCF116C442482CF60BCF4:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851238:J4vP1LGN8:m:1:3373497171:E9E2E98937CDCF116C442482CF60BCF4:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851238:J4vP1LGN8:m:1:3373497171:E9E2E98937CDCF116C442482CF60BCF4:r)

clean_body: | Peter - brace yourself. This Georgia Senate race is far from over. Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. However, my campaign is running on empty. The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP. This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. body:
If you want to flip the Senate, this is our last and best chance. |
---
Peter,

**I didn't get in this Senate race to lose.**

Even after being outspent $101 million to $32 million in the general election, we still almost beat an incumbent senator in a battleground state. But since no candidate received a majority of the vote on Tuesday, we now will have a runoff election in 24 days.

clean_body: If you want to flip the Senate, this is our last and best chance. | Peter, I didn't get in this Senate race to lose. Even after being outspent $101 million to $32 million in the general election, we still almost beat an incumbent senator in a battleground state. But since no candidate received a majority of the vote on Tuesday, we now will have a runoff election in 24 days. If you want to flip the Senate, Georgia is our last and best chance. Will you step up to help us get the job done? The vote on Tuesday was CLOSE. Just 0.9% separated Raphael Warnock and me. We anticipate the runoff will be incredibly close too, Thanks for standing with me and helping us win control of the U.S. Senate! Still in the fight, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Read on for an in-depth look at what we’re working on for the fight ahead → | | |
---
Peter -- what a week it’s been! With the midterm elections over, we wanted to take a minute to thank _you_ for all of your hard work. Here are a few examples of what the Democrats were able to do this cycle thanks to your support:
* 💵 Invested $90 million to state and electoral midterm programs.
* 💰 Transferred $27 million to our sister committees.
* 💪 Mobilized volunteers to take 500,000 actions for volunteer recruitment, voter registration, and GOTV.
* 📱 Made over 7.8 million calls and sent over 28 million text messages nationwide.

We couldn’t have done it without you and this grassroots team, Peter, and for that, we’re so grateful. ****Read on for an in-depth look at what we’re working on for the fight ahead →****

* * *
**Georgia Runoff** It’s official -- there’ll be a runoff in Georgia on December 6 between Sen. Raphael Warnock and Republican Herschel Walker. This grassroots team is going to make all the difference in this race, so we’re counting on your support, Peter. **[Sign up to volunteer for the Georgia runoff, and help us defeat Herschel Walker!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM1ayJZ6pcCUeqPgg7cKl_C7NB2jmmPE10b1OrYoTHsoU9coN_npZJNBe5DQ5MFbBt1JMcw2xlfOdQdf2jwlVRoF0b2_el_q8ewSXdcv6x2GYyj_yQClDW8DxCZcTjbfYOX254AtM65boc-Gvvf9HYB6-xZdbksCJSWHMlGP_-28Y-jfkMmnRHKX0-XLMpwcTby_FAIZGOwwuDaltmMhSHo3jSPKYoYxSJyo5VTnQnTBrqcYAwCkD1AbEgjS0cCQHfwzxs89bmuYxmo61A_wFAFao-mZj9fEOzeWmd9yOv2RvMPPGuB0Uwf8dcuXlDWqWs8/3r3/vS_xns2pSk6DGvoWeHXijQ/h0/gKTb7IJh0EcWUi1JV-guXMrH6S3HXO1ApItfjUUgD3c)**

* * *
**President Biden’s Message**
Did you catch President Biden’s speech on Wednesday? President Biden spoke optimistically about the future of the nation and what Democrats have done and will continue to do. Take a look:
_“**You’ve all heard me say it before, and I’ll say it again:** I honest to God have never been more optimistic about America’s future than today. And I’m optimistic for a number of reasons._
_We’re better situated than any nation in the world -- any nation in the world -- to lead the world. We’re better positioned than any nation in the world, in terms of our economic growth and possibilities.**And I’m optimistic because of the young people of this nation.** ”_

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8GbVg7HWNL7OXnFKgvkU29_VRrypN5CDLQ1ci8e7_jII1sASVJS5bxi6KRWKkHUPieaPwvYY9J7qUEIX0U3cFlbkfrXyexPczQ3VMASqG6vVq2eLOwwyQq4YiJ3cdFoxEbktK8GM1QNNnw6NLnlihEx-djGQNJfUe6Pm07CjRphMN9snudoe53Dq8F49VRNhWI-T2-28x8ErcrLyTL976Y4Xhbrqwkzkbbmq9Hx--TzVlRgOS91WDw2M5VFeKjNtNHVBM4gAI0P06S7AMYbdFkI9fYa_8xHyW9qz2McO54TBQ/3r3/vS_xns2pSk6DGvoWeHXijQ/h4/hB0IyDfZXJTQDoPJg-kezbvWBXqeHdDMhzOTXf_8IyY)

* * *
**Historic Outcomes**
Although we’re still waiting on some results, this midterm election had some historic outcomes. Thanks to the hard work of this team, we were able to secure a Democratic trifecta in Michigan, flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat and elect John Fetterman, fend off a GOP supermajority in North Carolina, and so much more!
Check out some of our historic wins:
* **Wes Moore** will be the first Black governor of Maryland.
* **Becca Balint** will become Vermont’s first woman and openly gay person to represent the state in Congress.
* **James Roesener** will be the first trans man elected to a state legislature (NH HD22, Ward 8).
* **Summer Lee** (PA-12) will be the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania.
* **Delia Ramirez** is the first Latina congresswoman from Illinois (IL-03).
* **Munira Abdullahi** is the first Somali American and first Muslim woman elected to Ohio General Assembly.
* **Shri Thanedar** will be the first Indian American to represent Michigan in Congress.
* **Robert Garcia** will be the first LGBTQ+ immigrant to serve in Congress.
* _And so many more!_

clean_body: Read on for an in-depth look at what we’re working on for the fight ahead → | | | Peter -- what a week it’s been! With the midterm elections over, we wanted to take a minute to thank you for all of your hard work. Here are a few examples of what the Democrats were able to do this cycle thanks to your support: 💵 Invested $90 million to state and electoral midterm programs. 💰 Transferred $27 million to our sister committees. 💪 Mobilized volunteers to take 500,000 actions for volunteer recruitment, voter registration, and GOTV. 📱 Made over 7.8 million calls and sent over 28 million text messages nationwide. We couldn’t have done it without you and this grassroots team, Peter, and for that, we’re so grateful. **Read on for an in-depth look at what we’re working on for the fight ahead → Georgia Runoff It’s official -- there’ll be a runoff in Georgia on December 6 between Sen. Raphael Warnock and Republican Herschel Walker. This grassroots team is going to make all the difference in this race, so we’re counting on your support, Peter. | | | | | President Biden’s Message Did you catch President Biden’s speech on Wednesday? President Biden spoke optimistically about the future of the nation and what Democrats have done and will continue to do. Take a look: “You’ve all heard me say it before, and I’ll say it again: I honest to God have never been more optimistic about America’s future than today. And I’m optimistic for a number of reasons. We’re better situated than any nation in the world -- any nation in the world -- to lead the world. We’re better positioned than any nation in the world, in terms of our economic growth and possibilities.And I’m optimistic because of the young people of this nation. ” | | Historic Outcomes Although we’re still waiting on some results, this midterm election had some historic outcomes. Thanks to the hard work of this team, we were able to secure a Democratic trifecta in Michigan, flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat and elect John Fetterman, fend off a GOP supermajority in North Carolina, and so much more! Check out some of our historic wins: Wes Moore will be the first Black governor of Maryland. Becca Balint will become Vermont’s first woman and openly gay person to represent the state in Congress. James Roesener will be the first trans man elected to a state legislature (NH HD22, Ward 8). Summer Lee (PA-12) will be the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania. Delia Ramirez is the first Latina congresswoman from Illinois (IL-03). Munira Abdullahi is the first Somali American and first Muslim woman elected to Ohio General Assembly. Shri Thanedar will be the first Indian American to represent Michigan in Congress. Robert Garcia will be the first LGBTQ+ immigrant to serve in Congress. And so many more! Wear It Loud and Proud With all the progress that Democrats have made in the last few years, we wanted to give you an opportunity to get your very own “Proud Democrat” pin. | | With this pin, you can literally wear your values on your sleeve -- and in doing so, support Democrats, start important conversations in your community, and inspire others to get involved with the Democratic party. It’s a win-win-win! Until next week, Team Joe | ---|--- | |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856222:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 23 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856222:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856223:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856224:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856225:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856222:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856222:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856222:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61856222:JaPSmLGNl:m:1:3331703221:290370C28FB21736869152A2B3E57762:r)

Friend – **Herschel Walker has shown us who he is, and we have to believe him.**
* Walker is campaigning for extreme, unpopular policies like a national abortion ban. Rev. Warnock is fighting to _restore_ reproductive freedom and LOWER everyday costs for families across our country.

* Walker has lied about his record. Rev. Warnock has always made it clear where he comes from and what he stands for.

* Walker is being bankrolled by Donald Trump's allies and Mitch McConnell's super PACs. Rev. Warnock is running a people-powered movement that's fueled by grassroots folks like you.

Herschel Walker is not ready for the job of U.S. senator – but here's why we're worried: **All signs suggest this race will be incredibly close.**
**With time running out, Rev. Warnock is counting on a massive surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. Warnock has always made it clear where he comes from and what he stands for. Walker is being bankrolled by Donald Trump's allies and Mitch McConnell's super PACs. Rev. Warnock is running a people-powered movement that's fueled by grassroots folks like you. Herschel Walker is not ready for the job of U.S. senator – but here's why we're worried: All signs suggest this race will be incredibly close. With time running out, Rev. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Put God First
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851106:65G6yLGlN:m:1:3253819041:CE80256576D4D8F83750FB888246B34D:r)
---

Despite the huge victories during the recent elections, we cannot just stop working on the things that really matter.

_**Our nation must renew its commitment to faith.**_

This nation was founded on Judeo-Christian principles and by God-fearing leaders. They knew that when we put God first, America prospers.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851106:65G6yLGlN:m:1:3253819041:CE80256576D4D8F83750FB888246B34D:r)
---

Today, our nation is at a crossroads. We can continue down the path of amoral materialism and transactional politics, or we can restore the faith-based leadership our founders championed.

**I want to be clear: faith -_and faith alone_ \- can bring America to salvation. **

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851106:65G6yLGlN:m:1:3253819041:CE80256576D4D8F83750FB888246B34D:r)
---

If you agree, _**[please consider making a donation today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851106:65G6yLGlN:m:1:3253819041:CE80256576D4D8F83750FB888246B34D:r "please consider
making a donation today")**_ to help restore faith-driven leadership to our nation.

I believe that if our leaders at the local, state, and federal levels were motivated by their devotion to God and their love of country, that America will rise to new heights.

The vision of the founders can still be restored.

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851106:65G6yLGlN:m:1:3253819041:CE80256576D4D8F83750FB888246B34D:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Championing Our American Values")

subject: I am so deeply honored that Arizonans have trusted me again to be their United States Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I am so deeply honored that Arizonans have trusted me again to be their United States Senator.
There are so many people to thank today, but this email is for you. Whether you’ve been with me since 2019, or you’ve only come into our orbit in the last few days and weeks — thank you for having my back.
When we launched this campaign, I never would've anticipated just how many people would join this mission. It means the world to me that millions of you stepped up to support me and this campaign.
And before I go too far, I want to make clear just how grateful I am to everyone who chipped in to help power us to victory. This campaign would not exist without you. A nurse from Phoenix, a teacher from Scottsdale, a firefighter from Tucson. More than 1.2 million people have donated to this campaign, from every state in the nation.
When I was at NASA, we’d train for two years for a shuttle mission. Two years of simulators, practicing our roles and responsibilities on the shuttle and the space station. Two years of working just to get on the launch pad, ready to go. Then, after liftoff, the real work started. Well, after two years and another successful campaign, the work starts on a full term in the Senate.
Let’s make sure to celebrate this win today, because we put so much into getting here.
Thank you so much for the opportunity to serve Arizona and this country. It means the world to me that so many of you were a part of this people-powered campaign.
My very, very best,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=4770%2E6688874%2EFzAN_3).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Sign the Card
subject: Happy Birthday, Joe Biden!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Quick, add your name now!
| | | [](http://go.dscc.org/go/10990?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221112-SignTheCard-BidenEarlyBdayRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221112-SignTheCard-BidenEarlyBdayRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8647%2E9716520%2EfdkNtj)
| | [SIGN THE CARD](http://go.dscc.org/go/10990?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221112-SignTheCard-BidenEarlyBdayRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221112-SignTheCard-BidenEarlyBdayRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8647%2E9716520%2EfdkNtj)
---

Exciting news, team: President Biden’s birthday is this month, **and we selected YOU to sign our official card!**

President Biden has spent two years delivering for the American people, and now is the _perfect opportunity_ to express our gratitude -- that’s why we’re hoping to get 50,000 signatures from top supporters like you.

**But we’re still missing your name, and we’re hoping to get your signature on the card by midnight!**

subject: This thing is far from done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851247:6vPUyLGqN:m:1:3374012347:3BAF500D708F99CC6D473ED43D7537B3:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851247:6vPUyLGqN:m:1:3374012347:3BAF500D708F99CC6D473ED43D7537B3:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851247:6vPUyLGqN:m:1:3374012347:3BAF500D708F99CC6D473ED43D7537B3:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851247:6vPUyLGqN:m:1:3374012347:3BAF500D708F99CC6D473ED43D7537B3:r)

Herschel Walker

Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851217:JuR8CLGN4:m:1:3374627611:5AAAED81AD77EE27025EED8969DE6078:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851217:JuR8CLGN4:m:1:3374627611:5AAAED81AD77EE27025EED8969DE6078:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851217:JuR8CLGN4:m:1:3374627611:5AAAED81AD77EE27025EED8969DE6078:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61851217:JuR8CLGN4:m:1:3374627611:5AAAED81AD77EE27025EED8969DE6078:r)

Herschel Walker
